contracts.name: Expanded Shallow Water Tano Block
minimumExplorationProgram: Reprocess existing 2D and acquire 1500sqkm of 3D seismic;

updates.2019:
The contractor did not fulfill the minimum work obligation even after extension to accommodate the ITLOS injunction. The Ministry has not provided update as to why the contractor still holds the block. No drilling has been undertaken.
The contractor did not fulfill the minimum work obligation even after extension to accommodate the ITLOS injunction. The Ministry has not provided update as to why the contractor still holds the block. No drilling has been undertaken.
updates.2020:
The Contractor did not undertake any activity during 2019. The parent company of the Operator, Erin Energy, i.e., Erin Energy Inc. has filed for bankruptcy in the United States. The PC and Ministry of Energy are engaging the other partners in the block for operations to resume.
The Contractor did not undertake any activity during 2019. The parent company of the Operator, Erin Energy, i.e., Erin Energy Inc. has filed for bankruptcy in the United States. The PC and Ministry of Energy are engaging the other partners in the block for operations to resume.
updates.2021:
The operator of the block, Erin Energy, which controlled 60 percent in the block went bankrupt in 2018, effectively relinquishing its interests in the block. The 2021 Semi-Annual Report reveals that Base Energy has been assigned operatorship and granted a 3-year extension to the initial exploration period in August 2020 to enable the contractors to fulfil their minimum work obligation. Base Energy claims it has completed economic screening and appraisal options for three existing discoveries on the block and plans for extended well testing options.
It is worth noting that Base Energy reports an increase in their interests from 5 percent to 67.5 percent. It is unclear how Base Energy acquired the interests of the Erin Energy. Any relinquished blocks and interests in Ghana’s upstream petroleum reverts to the state. While the law adequately provides for relinquished blocks, there is a gap on how the state should deal with relinquished interests.
The operator of the block, Erin Energy, which controlled 60 percent in the block went bankrupt in 2018, effectively relinquishing its interests in the block. The 2021 Semi-Annual Report reveals that Base Energy has been assigned operatorship and granted a 3-year extension to the initial exploration period in August 2020 to enable the contractors to fulfil their minimum work obligation. Base Energy claims it has completed economic screening and appraisal options for three existing discoveries on the block and plans for extended well testing options.
It is worth noting that Base Energy reports an increase in their interests from 5 percent to 67.5 percent. It is unclear how Base Energy acquired the interests of the Erin Energy. Any relinquished blocks and interests in Ghana’s upstream petroleum reverts to the state. While the law adequately provides for relinquished blocks, there is a gap on how the state should deal with relinquished interests.
updates.2022:
After assuming operatorship of the block, Base Energy is seeking farm-in partners to finance its exploration campaign.  The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
To enable Base Energy to finish its minimum work commitment, the Minister for Energy extended its initial exploration period by three years in August 2020. The 3-year extension granted Base Energy to fulfil its minimum work obligations elapses in 2023.
With respect to payment obligations on the Expanded Shallow Water Tano block, Base Energy has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$800.00
After assuming operatorship of the block, Base Energy is seeking farm-in partners to finance its exploration campaign.  The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
To enable Base Energy to finish its minimum work commitment, the Minister for Energy extended its initial exploration period by three years in August 2020. The 3-year extension granted Base Energy to fulfil its minimum work obligations elapses in 2023.
With respect to payment obligations on the Expanded Shallow Water Tano block, Base Energy has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$800.00
updates.2023:
Base Energy and GNPC Explorco are currently planning towards the acquisition of new 3D seismic data over the Expanded Shallow Water Tano Block by Q4 2024, an extension from the initial projected deadline of Q4 2023. In addition, the Contractor Parties in most part of 2023 promoted the Expanded Shallow Water Tano contract area for investment and for the development of existing discoveries on the block.
Base Energy has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$1,200.

		<style type="text/css">


#ma-simplify-black_white {
    color: black !important; 
    background-color: #ffffff;
}

#ma-simplify-black_sepia {
    color: black !important; 
    background-color: #D9C8AE;
}

#ma-simplify-yellow_black {
    color: yellow !important; 
    background-color: black;
}

#ma-simplify-blue_lightblue {
    color: #009 !important; 
    background-color: #6cf;
}

#talkify-audio {
    visibility: visible;
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0px;
    left: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    z-index: 99999999999999999999;
}


.monkeyAccess {
    position: fixed;
    right: 40px;
    top: 40px;
    z-index: 999999999;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 0 50% 50% 50%;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: dodgerblue;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    position: relative;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon:hover {
    background: #FFA500;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon i {
    font-size: 55px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 32px;
    top: -1px;
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
}

.monkeyAccess span {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 50px;
    color: white;
    margin-top: 4px!important;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    /* right: 110px; */
    /* top: 120px; */
    width: 340px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: "Arial", sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999999;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
    background: dodgerblue;
    color: white;
    font-weight: bold;
    line-height: 4px;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    list-style: none!important;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: background 0.2s;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {
    padding: 10px 0 0 0;
    display: inline-block;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    font-size: 60px;
    line-height: 60px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {
    font-size: 1em;
    position: relative;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li:hover {
    background: #eeeeee;
}

.maGrid:before,
.maGrid:after {
    content: " ";
    display: table;
    clear: both;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter {
    padding: 12px;
    border-radius: 0px 0px 10px 10px;
    background: white;
    font-size: 12px;
    border-top: 2px solid #dddddd;
    font-weight: bold;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter .logo svg {
    width: 36px;
    float: right;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter a {
    color: dodgerblue;
}



.rwScreenMaskOverlay {
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;

}

    opacity: 0.8;
    position: fixed;
    background: #000;
    width: 100%;
    left: 0;
    display: block;
    z-index: 99999;
}

.sm-screen-mask-upper {
    top: 0;
}

.sm-screen-mask-lower {
    bottom: 0;
}

        margin-bottom: 5px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {

        background: #FF9800;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {

<article id="post-6756" class="post-6756 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690394261496" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<ol>
<li>Expanded Shallow Water Tano Block (1,508sqkm)</li>
</ol>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p>Base Energy (Operator, formerly Erin Energy), GNPC EXPLORCO, GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period </strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: January 23, 2015</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (2 years+2 years): January 23, 2015 – January 22, 2019</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Reprocess existing 2D and acquire 1500sqkm of 3D seismic;</li>
<li>Drill one exploration well</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p>$30,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-heading"></div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647275469618-9fbad7e4-554e" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647275469650-52fa625e-3d86" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647275512946-39d8c1e5-b16f" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690302704155-6534da07-a667" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719938579337-a653afef-dcf2" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647275469618-9fbad7e4-554e" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647275469618-9fbad7e4-554e" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>The contractor did not fulfill the minimum work obligation even after extension to accommodate the ITLOS injunction. The Ministry has not provided update as to why the contractor still holds the block. No drilling has been undertaken.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647275469650-52fa625e-3d86" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647275469650-52fa625e-3d86" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The Contractor did not undertake any activity during 2019. The parent company of the Operator, Erin Energy, i.e., Erin Energy Inc. has filed for bankruptcy in the United States. The PC and Ministry of Energy are engaging the other partners in the block for operations to resume.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647275512946-39d8c1e5-b16f" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647275512946-39d8c1e5-b16f" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The operator of the block, Erin Energy, which controlled 60 percent in the block went bankrupt in 2018, effectively relinquishing its interests in the block. The 2021 Semi-Annual Report reveals that Base Energy has been assigned operatorship and granted a 3-year extension to the initial exploration period in August 2020 to enable the contractors to fulfil their minimum work obligation. Base Energy claims it has completed economic screening and appraisal options for three existing discoveries on the block and plans for extended well testing options.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">It is worth noting that Base Energy reports an increase in their interests from 5 percent to 67.5 percent. It is unclear how Base Energy acquired the interests of the Erin Energy. Any relinquished blocks and interests in Ghana’s upstream petroleum reverts to the state. While the law adequately provides for relinquished blocks, there is a gap on how the state should deal with relinquished interests.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690302704155-6534da07-a667" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690302704155-6534da07-a667" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">After assuming operatorship of the block, Base Energy is seeking farm-in partners to finance its exploration campaign.  The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">To enable Base Energy to finish its minimum work commitment, the Minister for Energy extended its initial exploration period by three years in August 2020. The 3-year extension granted Base Energy to fulfil its minimum work obligations elapses in 2023.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">With respect to payment obligations on the Expanded Shallow Water Tano block, Base Energy has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$800.00</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719938579337-a653afef-dcf2" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719938579337-a653afef-dcf2" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Base Energy and GNPC Explorco are currently planning towards the acquisition of new 3D seismic data over the Expanded Shallow Water Tano Block by Q4 2024, an extension from the initial projected deadline of Q4 2023. In addition, the Contractor Parties in most part of 2023 promoted the Expanded Shallow Water Tano contract area for investment and for the development of existing discoveries on the block.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Base Energy has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$1,200.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

            <style type="text/css" scoped>
            .vc_custom_1451998133493{margin-bottom: 30px !important;}        </style>
        <div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1451998133493"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_wp_custommenu wpb_content_element mb-30"></div>
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
					<div class="mdp-speaker-wrapper">
			<div class="mdp-speaker-box shortcode  speaker-rounded"
			     style="background: rgba(2, 83, 238, 1)">
				<div>
					<!--[if lt IE 9]><script>document.createElement('audio');</script><![endif]-->
<audio class="wp-audio-shortcode" id="audio-6756-1" preload="none" style="width: 100%;" controls="controls"><source type="audio/mpeg" src="http://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/uploads/speaker/post-6756.mp3?cb=1584053474.mp3&_=1" /><a href="http://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/uploads/speaker/post-6756.mp3?cb=1584053474.mp3">http://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/uploads/speaker/post-6756.mp3?cb=1584053474.mp3</a></audio>				</div>
			</div>

					</div>
		

		</div>
	</div>

			(function($){
				//Cursor Function ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
				$(".maCursor").clickToggle(function () {
					$('body').css('cursor', 'url(https://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/plugins/monkeyaccessibility/inc/cursor.png), auto');
					$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', 'url(https://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/plugins/monkeyaccessibility/inc/pointer.png), auto');
					$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', 'red');
					localStorage.setItem('cursor', 'on');
				}, function () {
					$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', '#333333');
					$('body').css('cursor', '');
					$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', '');
					localStorage.setItem('cursor', 'off');
				});
				
				// doc ready
				$(document).ready(function(){
					//Talkify ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
					talkify.config.remoteService.host = 'https://talkify.net';
					talkify.config.remoteService.apiKey = '09c7131b-2e6e-49fc-9736-95ccb39eec0d';
					
					talkify.config.ui.audioControls = {
						enabled: false, //<-- Disable to get the browser built in audio controls
						container: document.body
					};
                    
				 	var player = new talkify.TtsPlayer()
				    					.enableTextHighlighting();
					;
					
					var playlist = new talkify.playlist()
						.begin()
						.usingPlayer(player)
						.withElements()
												.withTextInteraction()
												.build()
				    				
					// Check if Cursor Activated ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
					var cursor = localStorage.getItem('cursor');
					if (cursor == 'on') {
						$('body').css('cursor', 'url(cursor.png), auto');
						$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', 'url(https://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/plugins/monkeyaccessibility/inc/pointer.png), auto');
						$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', 'red');
					} else {
						$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', '#333333');
						$('body').css('cursor', '');
						$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', '');
					}

					//Speak Function ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
					$(".maSpeak").clickToggle(function () {
						$('#talkify-audio').css('visibility','visible');	
						localStorage.setItem('speak', 'on');
						$('.maSpeak .maIcon').css('color', 'red');
						//play speaker
						
						playlist.play();
					}, function () {
						$('#talkify-audio').css('visibility','hidden');
						localStorage.setItem('speak', 'off');
						$('.maSpeak .maIcon').css('color', '#333333');
						playlist.pause();
					});

				}); // end Document.ready

			})(jQuery);
		</script>

contracts.name: Central Tano Block
minimumExplorationProgram: License 3D seismic data over Contract Area (about 277.9sqkm);

updates.2019:
The contractor did not fulfil the minimum work obligation even after extension to accommodate the ITLOS injunction. The Ministry has not provided update as to why the contractor still holds the block.
The contractor did not fulfil the minimum work obligation even after extension to accommodate the ITLOS injunction. The Ministry has not provided update as to why the contractor still holds the block.
updates.2020:
The Contractor got approval from the PC to use the Ensco DS7 drillship to drill the Kusia-1 exploration well in April-May 2020. Drilling deferred due to the CODVID-19 pandemic.  Drilling of Kusia-1 well rescheduled to Q4 2020/Q1 2021.
The Contractor got approval from the PC to use the Ensco DS7 drillship to drill the Kusia-1 exploration well in April-May 2020. Drilling deferred due to the CODVID-19 pandemic.  Drilling of Kusia-1 well rescheduled to Q4 2020/Q1 2021.
updates.2021:
AMNI planned its drilling program for Q2 of 2020 but rescheduled to Q4 of 2020 and beyond. The Minister of Energy granted AMNI a restitution time of eight (8) months compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.
In 2021, the contractor resumed plans towards its obligatory drilling well, Kusia-1X in Q2 2022, with well planning and drilling related procurements.
AMNI planned its drilling program for Q2 of 2020 but rescheduled to Q4 of 2020 and beyond. The Minister of Energy granted AMNI a restitution time of eight (8) months compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.
In 2021, the contractor resumed plans towards its obligatory drilling well, Kusia-1X in Q2 2022, with well planning and drilling related procurements.
updates.2022:
After completing the interpretation of the 1,600 km² Tano Deep 3D data set, together with some 450 km² of 3D PSDM reprocessed seismic data, the contractors have failed to drill its obligatory exploration well, Kusia-1X after a consistent postponement of the drilling campaign.  This comes on the back of several failed attempts to secure a farm-in partner to take up to 40% equity in the Block by funding at least one of the two obligation wells, with a negotiated contribution to past costs.
From the 2022 Annual Report of PIAC, Amni, after initially planning to drill its obligatory exploration well in Q4 2022, has rescheduled to Q2 2023. The IOC submitted its 2022 Annual Work Program and Budget, which indicated that the drilling of Kusia-1X will be subject to the availability of a suitable drilling rig. Amni is currently procuring goods and services for well planning and drilling.
After completing the interpretation of the 1,600 km² Tano Deep 3D data set, together with some 450 km² of 3D PSDM reprocessed seismic data, the contractors have failed to drill its obligatory exploration well, Kusia-1X after a consistent postponement of the drilling campaign.  This comes on the back of several failed attempts to secure a farm-in partner to take up to 40% equity in the Block by funding at least one of the two obligation wells, with a negotiated contribution to past costs.
From the 2022 Annual Report of PIAC, Amni, after initially planning to drill its obligatory exploration well in Q4 2022, has rescheduled to Q2 2023. The IOC submitted its 2022 Annual Work Program and Budget, which indicated that the drilling of Kusia-1X will be subject to the availability of a suitable drilling rig. Amni is currently procuring goods and services for well planning and drilling.
updates.2023:
AMNI is reportedly engaged in the well planning and procurement of goods and services required for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Kusia-1X, scheduled for Q4 2024. This follows previous rescheduling of the drilling operations, initially set for Q4 2022, then moved to Q2 2023, and subsequently to Q4 2023.
AMNI is reportedly engaged in the well planning and procurement of goods and services required for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Kusia-1X, scheduled for Q4 2024. This follows previous rescheduling of the drilling operations, initially set for Q4 2022, then moved to Q2 2023, and subsequently to Q4 2023.

    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {

        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;

        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;

    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {

<article id="post-6787" class="post-6787 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1647272208233" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<blockquote><p>
2. Central Tano Block
</p></blockquote>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p>AMNI International (Operator), GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p>Effective Date: March 21, 2014</p>
<p>Initial Exploration Period (3 years+2 years extension): March 21, 2014 – March 20, 2020</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li style="text-align: justify;">License 3D seismic data over Contract Area (about 277.9sqkm);</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill two (2) Exploration Wells</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p>$150,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-heading"></div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647277835342-8dbad565-cab5" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647277835364-ab958687-0c71" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647277879046-56b8fa77-2c0e" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690290043841-84c488d9-cc65" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719933129541-8865ec61-a74d" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647277835342-8dbad565-cab5" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647277835342-8dbad565-cab5" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor did not fulfil the minimum work obligation even after extension to accommodate the ITLOS injunction. The Ministry has not provided update as to why the contractor still holds the block.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647277835364-ab958687-0c71" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647277835364-ab958687-0c71" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The Contractor got approval from the PC to use the Ensco DS7 drillship to drill the Kusia-1 exploration well in April-May 2020. Drilling deferred due to the CODVID-19 pandemic.  <span lang="EN-GB">Drilling of Kusia-1 well rescheduled to Q4 2020/Q1 2021.</span></p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647277879046-56b8fa77-2c0e" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647277879046-56b8fa77-2c0e" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">AMNI planned its drilling program for Q2 of 2020 but rescheduled to Q4 of 2020 and beyond. The Minister of Energy granted AMNI a restitution time of eight (8) months compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">In 2021, the contractor resumed plans towards its obligatory drilling well, Kusia-1X in Q2 2022, with well planning and drilling related procurements.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690290043841-84c488d9-cc65" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690290043841-84c488d9-cc65" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">After completing the interpretation of the 1,600 km² Tano Deep 3D data set, together with some 450 km² of 3D PSDM reprocessed seismic data, the contractors have failed to drill its obligatory exploration well, Kusia-1X after a consistent postponement of the drilling campaign.  This comes on the back of several failed attempts to secure a farm-in partner to take up to 40% equity in the Block by funding at least one of the two obligation wells, with a negotiated contribution to past costs.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">From the 2022 Annual Report of PIAC, Amni, after initially planning to drill its obligatory exploration well in Q4 2022, has rescheduled to Q2 2023. The IOC submitted its 2022 Annual Work Program and Budget, which indicated that the drilling of Kusia-1X will be subject to the availability of a suitable drilling rig. Amni is currently procuring goods and services for well planning and drilling.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719933129541-8865ec61-a74d" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719933129541-8865ec61-a74d" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">AMNI is reportedly engaged in the well planning and procurement of goods and services required for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Kusia-1X, scheduled for Q4 2024. This follows previous rescheduling of the drilling operations, initially set for Q4 2022, then moved to Q2 2023, and subsequently to Q4 2023.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

contracts.name: Deepwater Tano-CTP Block
minimumExplorationProgram: Drilling of 3 appraisal wells (2 in the Pecan area and 1 at Almond)
Well data integration of all data

updates.2019:
Aker acquired the interest of Hess in the block and proceeded to complete appraisals studies. Programme of Development (PoD) was submitted to government. The PoD was not  approved. Aker has to revise and resubmit the PoD.
Aker acquired the interest of Hess in the block and proceeded to complete appraisals studies. Programme of Development (PoD) was submitted to government. The PoD was not  approved. Aker has to revise and resubmit the PoD.
updates.2020:
Aker awaited some amendments to its PA to finalize the Pecan PoD and resubmit. Parliament amended the DWTCTP PA in December 2020. However, Aker suspended the development of the field in April 2020 due to low oil prices and the COVID-19 pandemic.
Aker awaited some amendments to its PA to finalize the Pecan PoD and resubmit. Parliament amended the DWTCTP PA in December 2020. However, Aker suspended the development of the field in April 2020 due to low oil prices and the COVID-19 pandemic.
updates.2021:
In 2020, Aker Energy suspended and postponed all Pecan Field development activities on account of the impact of Covid-19. As of the time of this report, the contractors have not submitted a revised PoD for the Pecan Field as expected.
In 2021, GNPC proposed and submitted a memo approved by Cabinet to Parliament to acquire additional 37 percent share in this block. This proposal raised significant opposition on the propriety and fiscal implications from CSOs in the sector and other stakeholders in the sector. The advocacy from these actors raised important threats of the proposal to the country’s fiscal situation including issues with the valuations and value-for-money concerns resulting in a suspension of the plans.
In 2020, Aker Energy suspended and postponed all Pecan Field development activities on account of the impact of Covid-19. As of the time of this report, the contractors have not submitted a revised PoD for the Pecan Field as expected.
In 2021, GNPC proposed and submitted a memo approved by Cabinet to Parliament to acquire additional 37 percent share in this block. This proposal raised significant opposition on the propriety and fiscal implications from CSOs in the sector and other stakeholders in the sector. The advocacy from these actors raised important threats of the proposal to the country’s fiscal situation including issues with the valuations and value-for-money concerns resulting in a suspension of the plans.
updates.2022:
Aker has enjoyed consistent extensions to submit a revised POD after failing to deliver on several deadlines. In 2022, the company was unable to meet the June 30, 2022, deadline and sought an extension of the deadline on account of potential sanctions on Russian oil firm Lukoil (a partner on the block) due to the Russian-Ukraine War. Lukoil maintains that the decision to postpone the submission of the revised POD has no lawful grounds.
The Ministry of Energy granted a three-month extension from June 30, 2022. ACEP’s industry intelligence indicates that Aker failed to meet this deadline, with another extension granted to December 2022.
Aker has enjoyed consistent extensions to submit a revised POD after failing to deliver on several deadlines. In 2022, the company was unable to meet the June 30, 2022, deadline and sought an extension of the deadline on account of potential sanctions on Russian oil firm Lukoil (a partner on the block) due to the Russian-Ukraine War. Lukoil maintains that the decision to postpone the submission of the revised POD has no lawful grounds.
The Ministry of Energy granted a three-month extension from June 30, 2022. ACEP’s industry intelligence indicates that Aker failed to meet this deadline, with another extension granted to December 2022.
updates.2023:
In H1 2023, Pecan Energies on behalf of the DWT/CTP partners submitted a Plan of Development (PoD) in respect of the Pecan Field to the Minister for Energy for approval. The Minister granted approval to the PoD which is expected to be a phased development of the Pecan Field in 2025.
In H1 2023, Pecan Energies on behalf of the DWT/CTP partners submitted a Plan of Development (PoD) in respect of the Pecan Field to the Minister for Energy for approval. The Minister granted approval to the PoD which is expected to be a phased development of the Pecan Field in 2025.

}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {

    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;

    transition: transform 0.2s;

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li:hover {

.maGrid:after {

<article id="post-6797" class="post-6797 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582806516691" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<blockquote><p>
3. Deepwater Tano-CTP Block (3000sqkm)
</p></blockquote>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p>Aker Energy (Operator), LukOil, Fuel Trade, GNPC EXPLORCO, GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: July 19, 2006</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Appraisal/Pre-development Period (3 years from Notice of Discovery).</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Has 6 months after ITLOS ruling to submit POD.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li style="text-align: justify;">
<p style="text-align: justify;">3D ‘Broadband’ seismic acquisition</p>
</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Drilling of 3 appraisal wells (2 in the Pecan area and 1 at Almond)</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Reprocessing of legacy 3D seismic</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Well data integration of all data</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Reservoir simulation studies</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">
<p style="text-align: justify;">Geochemistry study</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6793">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p>$32,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accordion-heading"></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1582666178488-08fa5963-6d31f9b9-4971" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647273851729-808e9a09-b709" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647273981016-bff5f70f-94c9" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690293317672-a4d11522-6421" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719941003694-c5a7ba45-fb34" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1582666178488-08fa5963-6d31f9b9-4971" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1582666178488-08fa5963-6d31f9b9-4971" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Aker acquired the interest of Hess in the block and proceeded to complete appraisals studies. Programme of Development (PoD) was submitted to government. The PoD was not  approved. Aker has to revise and resubmit the PoD.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647273851729-808e9a09-b709" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647273851729-808e9a09-b709" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Aker awaited some amendments to its PA to finalize the Pecan PoD and resubmit. Parliament amended the DWTCTP PA in December 2020. However, Aker suspended the development of the field in April 2020 due to low oil prices and the COVID-19 pandemic.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647273981016-bff5f70f-94c9" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647273981016-bff5f70f-94c9" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p class="talkify-highlight" style="text-align: justify;">In 2020, Aker Energy suspended and postponed all Pecan Field development activities on account of the impact of Covid-19. As of the time of this report, the contractors have not submitted a revised PoD for the Pecan Field as expected.</p>
<p class="talkify-highlight" style="text-align: justify;">In 2021, GNPC proposed and submitted a memo approved by Cabinet to Parliament to acquire additional 37 percent share in this block. This proposal raised significant opposition on the propriety and fiscal implications from CSOs in the sector and other stakeholders in the sector. The advocacy from these actors raised important threats of the proposal to the country’s fiscal situation including issues with the valuations and value-for-money concerns resulting in a suspension of the plans.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690293317672-a4d11522-6421" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690293317672-a4d11522-6421" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Aker has enjoyed consistent extensions to submit a revised POD after failing to deliver on several deadlines. In 2022, the company was unable to meet the June 30, 2022, deadline and sought an extension of the deadline on account of potential sanctions on Russian oil firm Lukoil (a partner on the block) due to the Russian-Ukraine War. Lukoil maintains that the decision to postpone the submission of the revised POD has no lawful grounds.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The Ministry of Energy granted a three-month extension from June 30, 2022. ACEP’s industry intelligence indicates that Aker failed to meet this deadline, with another extension granted to December 2022.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719941003694-c5a7ba45-fb34" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719941003694-c5a7ba45-fb34" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">In H1 2023, Pecan Energies on behalf of the DWT/CTP partners submitted a Plan of Development (PoD) in respect of the Pecan Field to the Minister for Energy for approval. The Minister granted approval to the PoD which is expected to be a phased development of the Pecan Field in 2025.</p>

contracts.name: South Deepwater Tano
minimumExplorationProgram: Acquire, process and interpret 750sqkm of 3D seismic data
Drill a minimum of two (2) Exploration Well

updates.2019:
The Contractor drilled two exploration wells, the Nyankom-1X and the Kyenkyen-1X. Nyankom-1X was declared a discovery.
The Contractor drilled two exploration wells, the Nyankom-1X and the Kyenkyen-1X. Nyankom-1X was declared a discovery.
updates.2020:
Contractor submitted an appraisal programme for the Nyankom-1X discovery for PC’s approval. PC reviewed the documents and proposed changes for incorporation.
Resubmission of Appraisal Programme, approval and commencement of appraisal activities may be delayed. Contractor has informed the Commission of suspension of of operations to ensure the  safety of its personnel due to CODVID-19.
Contractor submitted an appraisal programme for the Nyankom-1X discovery for PC’s approval. PC reviewed the documents and proposed changes for incorporation.
Resubmission of Appraisal Programme, approval and commencement of appraisal activities may be delayed. Contractor has informed the Commission of suspension of of operations to ensure the  safety of its personnel due to CODVID-19.
updates.2021:
This block is at the pre-development phase after successful discovery in one of its two drilled wells, the Nyankom – 1X in 2019. The block is yet to be appraised. The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the contractors prepared an appraisal programme for the Nyankom discovery to be submitted in Q3 of 2021.
In 2021, GNPC proposed and submitted a memo approved by Cabinet to Parliament to acquire additional 70 percent share in this block. This proposal raised significant opposition on the propriety and fiscal implications from CSOs in the sector and other stakeholders in the sector. The advocacy from these actors raised important threats of the proposal to the country’s fiscal situation including issues with the valuations of a non-appraised asset and value-for-money concerns, resulting in a suspension of the plans.
This block is at the pre-development phase after successful discovery in one of its two drilled wells, the Nyankom – 1X in 2019. The block is yet to be appraised. The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the contractors prepared an appraisal programme for the Nyankom discovery to be submitted in Q3 of 2021.
In 2021, GNPC proposed and submitted a memo approved by Cabinet to Parliament to acquire additional 70 percent share in this block. This proposal raised significant opposition on the propriety and fiscal implications from CSOs in the sector and other stakeholders in the sector. The advocacy from these actors raised important threats of the proposal to the country’s fiscal situation including issues with the valuations of a non-appraised asset and value-for-money concerns, resulting in a suspension of the plans.
updates.2022:
AGM resumed work in April 2022 after a brief suspension in April 2020 and is currently seeking for an extension to the Initial Exploration period.
AGM resumed work in April 2022 after a brief suspension in April 2020 and is currently seeking for an extension to the Initial Exploration period.
updates.2023:
In March 2023, AGM notified the Minister of Energy of its decision not to exercise its option to enter the First Extension Peod of Exploration. By this, AGM voluntarily relinquished all its interest in the South Deepwater Tano block and subsequently exited from the block.

#talkify-audio {
    visibility: visible;
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0px;
    left: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    z-index: 99999999999999999999;
}


.monkeyAccess {
    position: fixed;
    right: 40px;
    top: 40px;
    z-index: 999999999;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 0 50% 50% 50%;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: dodgerblue;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    position: relative;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon:hover {
    background: #FFA500;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon i {
    font-size: 55px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 32px;
    top: -1px;
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
}

.monkeyAccess span {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 50px;
    color: white;
    margin-top: 4px!important;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    /* right: 110px; */
    /* top: 120px; */
    width: 340px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: "Arial", sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999999;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
    background: dodgerblue;
    color: white;
    font-weight: bold;
    line-height: 4px;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    list-style: none!important;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: background 0.2s;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {
    padding: 10px 0 0 0;
    display: inline-block;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    font-size: 60px;
    line-height: 60px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {
    font-size: 1em;
    position: relative;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li:hover {
    background: #eeeeee;
}

.maGrid:before,
.maGrid:after {
    content: " ";
    display: table;
    clear: both;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter {
    padding: 12px;
    border-radius: 0px 0px 10px 10px;
    background: white;
    font-size: 12px;
    border-top: 2px solid #dddddd;
    font-weight: bold;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter .logo svg {
    width: 36px;
    float: right;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter a {
    color: dodgerblue;
}



.rwScreenMaskOverlay {
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    background-color: #000;
    width: 100%;
    z-index: 10000;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.sm-screen-mask {
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: fixed;
    background: #000;
    width: 100%;
    left: 0;
    display: block;
    z-index: 99999;
}

.sm-screen-mask-upper {
    top: 0;
}

.sm-screen-mask-lower {
    bottom: 0;
}

    .talkify .playing {
        -ms-border-radius: 5px;
        border-radius: 5px;
        background: #ccc !important;
        color: black !important;
    }

    .talkify-highlight {
        -webkit-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -moz-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -ms-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -o-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        transition: background-color 0.25s;
    }

    .talkify-highlight:hover {
        background-color: #59d600 !important;
        color: #fff !important;
    }

    .talkify-word-highlight {
        color: #fff!important;
        background-color: #E50000 !important;
    }
    .talkify-inline {
        display: inline-block;
        color: #fff;
    }

    .talkify-hidden{
        display: none !important;
    }

    .talkify-disabled {
        color: #ffffff !important;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) !important;
    }

    .talkify-clickable {
        cursor: pointer;
    } 


    }
    
    .talkify-audio-control > *, .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        vertical-align: middle;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress {
        width: 50%;
        background-color: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
        background-color: #5e5e5e
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-value {
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-moz-progress-bar {
        /* style rules */
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control i, .talkify-audio-control input, .talkify-audio-control span {
        margin: 0 5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control .talkify-audio-control-voice-wrapper {
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
            background: white;
        }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        -ms-border-radius: 3px;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #777;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #888;
    }


    .hidePlayer {
        display:none!important;
    }

    .ma-help-text {
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
        
    }
    .ma-help-text li {
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #efefef;
        padding-bottom: 20px;
    }
    
    .ma-help-text li i {
        margin-right: 20px;
    }
    
    #simplifiedText-container {
        z-index: 9999999999999;
        width:100vw;
        height:100vh;
        overflow: scroll;
        display:none;
        position: fixed;
    }
    
    .simplifiedText-header {
        border-bottom: 1px solid #666;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    
    .simplifiedText-header-block {
        display: inline-block;
        padding: 20px;
        text-align: center;
        width: 33%;
    }
    
    #simplifiedText {
        padding: 20px;
    }
    
    #ma-simplify-colours a.selected, #ma-simplify-textsize a.selected {
        outline: #ed8507 solid 4px!important;
    }
    #ma-simplify-colours a {
        margin-left: 5px!important;
        font-weight: 700!important;
        border: 4px solid transparent!important;
        padding: 3px 8px!important;
    }
    
    #ma-simplify-textsize a, #ma-simplify-textsize a:hover {
        text-decoration: none!important;
        margin: 0 2px!important;
        border: 4px solid transparent!important;
        position: relative!important;
        color: #096969!important;
        font-weight: 700!important;
    }
    
    #ma-simplify-sizeMedium {
        font-size: 1.2em;
        top: 1px;
        line-height: 0;
    }
    
    #ma-simplify-sizeLarge {
        font-size: 1.5em;
        top: 2px;
        line-height: 0;
    }
    
    #maCloseButton {
        background: rgb(244, 82, 77);
        color: white;
        border: none;
        padding: 8px;
        width: 80px;
    }
    
    #maPrintButton {
         background: #93d262;
        color: white;
        border: none;
        padding: 8px;
        width: 80px;
    }
    
    #maHelpTable {
        width:100%;
        height:90%
    }

    #maHelpTable tr {
        border-bottom: 1px solid #ebebeb;
    }
    
    #maHelpTable tr:last-child {
        border-bottom: none;
    }
    
    #maHelpTable tr td:first-child {
        width: 50px;
        vertical-align: middle;
    }

    #maHelpTable tr td:first-child i {
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 28px;
        width: 32px;
        height: 32px;
        line-height: 40px;
        top: -2px;
        word-spacing: 1px;
        position: relative;
        text-align: center;
        vertical-align: middle;
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    #maHelpTable td {
        font-size: 14px;
        line-height: 24px;
    }
    
    #maHelpMenu .closeHelp {
        background: red;
        color: white;
        padding: 5px;
        border-radius: 50px;
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
        text-align: center;
        line-height: 15px;
        font-size: 16px;
        top: -2px;
        word-spacing: 1px;
        position: relative;
        text-align: center;
        vertical-align: middle;
    }
    
    
    a:focus {
        border: 4px solid #ed8507;
    }
    

    

    
    @media only screen and (max-width : 480px) {
        .simplifiedText-header-block {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: left;
            width: 100%;
        }
    }

<article id="post-6808" class="post-6808 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690394720544" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>4. South Deepwater Tano (3,482sqkm)</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6807">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties </strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">AGM Petroleum (Operator), GNPC EXPLORCO, GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: January 24, 2014</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (3 years+2 years extension): January 24, 2014 – January 23, 2019</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Acquire, process and interpret 750sqkm of 3D seismic data</p>
</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill a minimum of two (2) Exploration Well</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6807">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure </strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">$259,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accordion-heading"></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647337694313-d32a265d-f484" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647337694336-fdf57428-24bc" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647337750872-d30bc26e-c112" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690315112271-089bd3d1-c3c8" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719941099359-5b828c77-2b95" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647337694313-d32a265d-f484" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647337694313-d32a265d-f484" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6807">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-US">The Contractor drilled two exploration wells, the Nyankom-1X and the </span><span lang="EN-US">Kyenkyen-1X. </span><span lang="EN-US">Nyankom-1X was declared a discovery.</span></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647337694336-fdf57428-24bc" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647337694336-fdf57428-24bc" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" style="text-align: justify;" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6807">
<p class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;">Contractor submitted an appraisal programme for the Nyankom-1X discovery for PC’s approval. PC reviewed the documents and proposed changes for incorporation.</p>
<p class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">Resubmission of Appraisal Programme, approval and commencement of appraisal activities may be delayed. Contractor has informed the Commission of suspension of of operations to ensure the  safety of its personnel due to CODVID-19.</span></p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647337750872-d30bc26e-c112" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647337750872-d30bc26e-c112" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" style="text-align: justify;" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6807">
<p style="text-align: justify;">This block is at the pre-development phase after successful discovery in one of its two drilled wells, the Nyankom – 1X in 2019. The block is yet to be appraised. The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the contractors prepared an appraisal programme for the Nyankom discovery to be submitted in Q3 of 2021.</p>
<p class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;">In 2021, GNPC proposed and submitted a memo approved by Cabinet to Parliament to acquire additional 70 percent share in this block. This proposal raised significant opposition on the propriety and fiscal implications from CSOs in the sector and other stakeholders in the sector. The advocacy from these actors raised important threats of the proposal to the country’s fiscal situation including issues with the valuations of a non-appraised asset and value-for-money concerns, resulting in a suspension of the plans.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690315112271-089bd3d1-c3c8" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690315112271-089bd3d1-c3c8" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">AGM resumed work in April 2022 after a brief suspension in April 2020 and is currently seeking for an extension to the Initial Exploration period.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719941099359-5b828c77-2b95" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719941099359-5b828c77-2b95" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">In March 2023, AGM notified the Minister of Energy of its decision not to exercise its option to enter the First Extension Peod of Exploration. By this, AGM voluntarily relinquished all its interest in the South Deepwater Tano block and subsequently exited from the block.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

            <style type="text/css" scoped>
            .vc_custom_1451998133493{margin-bottom: 30px !important;}        </style>
        <div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1451998133493"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_wp_custommenu wpb_content_element mb-30"></div>
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">

			<div class="mdp-speaker-box shortcode  speaker-rounded"
			     style="background: rgba(2, 83, 238, 1)">

</article>
