contracts.name: Offshore South-West Tano Block

updates.2019:
The Contractor has informed the PC of its plan to drill its first exploration well, Asanfena-1X in Q3 2020. Contractor began the process of procuring goods and services for the well.
The Contractor has informed the PC of its plan to drill its first exploration well, Asanfena-1X in Q3 2020. Contractor began the process of procuring goods and services for the well.
updates.2020:
Drilling of well may be deferred to 2021 due to the CODVID-19 pandemic.
Drilling of well may be deferred to 2021 due to the CODVID-19 pandemic.
updates.2021:
In 2020, the contractors submitted to the Petroleum Commission, plans for exploration drilling preparatory activities including contracting of key services, and plans to secure a rig. These plans were however suspended on account of Covid.
The Minister for Energy granted GOSCO a restitution time of nine (9) months to compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.
The contractors plan to drill their obligatory exploration well, Mansonia1X in Q2 2022.
In 2020, the contractors submitted to the Petroleum Commission, plans for exploration drilling preparatory activities including contracting of key services, and plans to secure a rig. These plans were however suspended on account of Covid.
The Minister for Energy granted GOSCO a restitution time of nine (9) months to compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.
The contractors plan to drill their obligatory exploration well, Mansonia1X in Q2 2022.
updates.2022:
In 2021, GOSCO completed well planning and drilling-related procurement of goods and services, as well as preparations for drilling its mandatory exploration well, Mansonia-1X, in Q4 2022.
GOSCO changed its name to OSWT & EK Operating Company Ghana Limited (OPCO) in March 2022, which was brought to the attention of the Minister of Energy.
OPCO has revised its timeline for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Mansonia-1X, from the fourth quarter of 2022 to the second quarter of 2023.
In 2021, GOSCO completed well planning and drilling-related procurement of goods and services, as well as preparations for drilling its mandatory exploration well, Mansonia-1X, in Q4 2022.
GOSCO changed its name to OSWT & EK Operating Company Ghana Limited (OPCO) in March 2022, which was brought to the attention of the Minister of Energy.
OPCO has revised its timeline for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Mansonia-1X, from the fourth quarter of 2022 to the second quarter of 2023.
updates.2023:
OPCO conducted well planning and procured goods and services related to drilling in 2021, preparing for the drilling of its obligatory exploration well scheduled for Q4 2024. This is yet another rescheduling, following previous delays from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023, and then to Q4 2023. Additionally, OPCO is reported to be in discussions with Tullow for a potential rig-sharing opportunity.
OPCO has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$100 for the Offshore South West Tano Block

        vertical-align: middle;

    .talkify-audio-control progress {
        width: 50%;
        background-color: white;

        background-color: #5e5e5e
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-value {
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-moz-progress-bar {
        /* style rules */
        background-color: #1ed760;

    .talkify-audio-control i, .talkify-audio-control input, .talkify-audio-control span {
        margin: 0 5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control .talkify-audio-control-voice-wrapper {
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
            background: white;
        }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        -ms-border-radius: 3px;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #777;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #888;
    }

	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: February 5, 2015</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (2.5 years+2 years extension): February 5, 2015 – August 4, 2019</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Reprocess up to 175sqkm of 3D data</p>
</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well</p>
</li>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The Contractor has informed the PC of its plan to drill its first exploration well, Asanfena-1X in Q3 2020. Contractor began the process of procuring goods and services for the well.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647338812227-b9a795f9-7ecc" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647338812227-b9a795f9-7ecc" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Drilling of well may be deferred to 2021 due to the CODVID-19 pandemic.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647338872676-5070ac94-aa6f" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647338872676-5070ac94-aa6f" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>In 2020, the contractors submitted to the Petroleum Commission, plans for exploration drilling preparatory activities including contracting of key services, and plans to secure a rig. These plans were however suspended on account of Covid.</p>
<p>The Minister for Energy granted GOSCO a restitution time of nine (9) months to compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.</p>
<p>The contractors plan to drill their obligatory exploration well, Mansonia1X in Q2 2022.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690391371063-ce5d6872-5a98" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690391371063-ce5d6872-5a98" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">In 2021, GOSCO completed well planning and drilling-related procurement of goods and services, as well as preparations for drilling its mandatory exploration well, Mansonia-1X, in Q4 2022.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">GOSCO changed its name to OSWT & EK Operating Company Ghana Limited (OPCO) in March 2022, which was brought to the attention of the Minister of Energy.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">OPCO has revised its timeline for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Mansonia-1X, from the fourth quarter of 2022 to the second quarter of 2023.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719932992582-bc3332b2-e191" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719932992582-bc3332b2-e191" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">OPCO conducted well planning and procured goods and services related to drilling in 2021, preparing for the drilling of its obligatory exploration well scheduled for Q4 2024. This is yet another rescheduling, following previous delays from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023, and then to Q4 2023. Additionally, OPCO is reported to be in discussions with Tullow for a potential rig-sharing opportunity.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">OPCO has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$100 for the Offshore South West Tano Block</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">

contracts.name: Shallow Water Cape Three Points Block

updates.2019:
The contractor did not fulfill the minimum work obligation in the first phase, which expired in 2017. The Ministry of Energy has not provided update on the status of the agreement. However, the map of the western basin still shows that the contract area is owned by Sahara.
The contractor did not fulfill the minimum work obligation in the first phase, which expired in 2017. The Ministry of Energy has not provided update on the status of the agreement. However, the map of the western basin still shows that the contract area is owned by Sahara.
updates.2020: The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019.
updates.2021:
The contractors on the block are required to conduct geological and geophysical studies drill one (1) exploration well. The contractors have failed to deliver on their minimum work and financial obligations since the expiration of their initial exploration period. While there is no evidence of the contractors being granted an extension after 2017, the petroleum register still lists them as the holders of the Shallow Water Cape Three Points.
The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance.
The contractors on the block are required to conduct geological and geophysical studies drill one (1) exploration well. The contractors have failed to deliver on their minimum work and financial obligations since the expiration of their initial exploration period. While there is no evidence of the contractors being granted an extension after 2017, the petroleum register still lists them as the holders of the Shallow Water Cape Three Points.
The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance.
updates.2022:
The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. Concerning payment obligations on the Shallow Water Cape Three Points Block, Sahara Energy paid US$71,934.93 out of the US$146,934.93 in outstanding Surface Rentals in the first quarter of 2022, leaving an unpaid balance of US$75,000.00.
The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
updates.2023:
Agreement terminated since April 2021

#ma-simplify-black_white {

}

#ma-simplify-blue_lightblue {

    background-color: #6cf;
}

#talkify-audio {
    visibility: visible;
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0px;
    left: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    z-index: 99999999999999999999;
}


.monkeyAccess {
    position: fixed;
    right: 40px;
    top: 40px;
    z-index: 999999999;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 0 50% 50% 50%;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: dodgerblue;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    position: relative;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon:hover {
    background: #FFA500;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon i {
    font-size: 55px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 32px;
    top: -1px;
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
}

.monkeyAccess span {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 50px;
    color: white;
    margin-top: 4px!important;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    /* right: 110px; */
    /* top: 120px; */
    width: 340px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: "Arial", sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999999;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
    background: dodgerblue;
    color: white;
    font-weight: bold;
    line-height: 4px;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    list-style: none!important;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: background 0.2s;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {
    padding: 10px 0 0 0;
    display: inline-block;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    font-size: 60px;
    line-height: 60px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {
    font-size: 1em;
    position: relative;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li:hover {
    background: #eeeeee;
}

.maGrid:before,
.maGrid:after {
    content: " ";
    display: table;
    clear: both;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter {
    padding: 12px;
    border-radius: 0px 0px 10px 10px;
    background: white;
    font-size: 12px;
    border-top: 2px solid #dddddd;
    font-weight: bold;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter .logo svg {
    width: 36px;
    float: right;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter a {
    color: dodgerblue;
}



.rwScreenMaskOverlay {
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    background-color: #000;
    width: 100%;
    z-index: 10000;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.sm-screen-mask {
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: fixed;
    background: #000;
    width: 100%;
    left: 0;
    display: block;
    z-index: 99999;
}

.sm-screen-mask-upper {
    top: 0;
}

.sm-screen-mask-lower {
    bottom: 0;
}

    .talkify .playing {
        -ms-border-radius: 5px;
        border-radius: 5px;
        background: #ccc !important;
        color: black !important;
    }

    .talkify-highlight {
        -webkit-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -moz-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -ms-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -o-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        transition: background-color 0.25s;
    }

    .talkify-highlight:hover {
        background-color: #59d600 !important;
        color: #fff !important;
    }

    .talkify-word-highlight {
        color: #fff!important;
        background-color: #E50000 !important;
    }
    .talkify-inline {
        display: inline-block;
        color: #fff;
    }

    .talkify-hidden{
        display: none !important;
    }

    .talkify-disabled {
        color: #ffffff !important;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) !important;
    }

    .talkify-clickable {
        cursor: pointer;
    } 


    }
    
    .talkify-audio-control > *, .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        vertical-align: middle;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress {
        width: 50%;
        background-color: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
        background-color: #5e5e5e
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-value {
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-moz-progress-bar {
        /* style rules */
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control i, .talkify-audio-control input, .talkify-audio-control span {
        margin: 0 5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control .talkify-audio-control-voice-wrapper {
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
            background: white;
        }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        -ms-border-radius: 3px;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #777;
        border-radius: 10px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #888;
    }

<article id="post-6831" class="post-6831 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690397666094" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>6. Shallow Water Cape Three Points Block (1500sqkm)</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6832">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Sahara Energy (Operator), GNPC, Sapholda E&P</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;">
<p><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p>Effective Date: July 17, 2014</p>
<p>Initial Exploration Period(3 years): July 17, 2014 – July 16, 2017</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li style="text-align: justify;">
<p style="text-align: justify;">Conduct geological and geophysical studies</p>
</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">$32,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647340014338-3c52695d-6660" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647340014359-606dce37-d436" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647340042887-e3341e1e-2f22" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690314567544-5e3cf1c8-59b8" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719939810069-590fecf3-3d6c" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647340014338-3c52695d-6660" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647340014338-3c52695d-6660" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor did not fulfill the minimum work obligation in the first phase, which expired in 2017. The Ministry of Energy has not provided update on the status of the agreement. However, the map of the western basin still shows that the contract area is owned by Sahara.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647340014359-606dce37-d436" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647340014359-606dce37-d436" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<pre style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019.</span></pre>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647340042887-e3341e1e-2f22" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647340042887-e3341e1e-2f22" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractors on the block are required to conduct geological and geophysical studies drill one (1) exploration well. The contractors have failed to deliver on their minimum work and financial obligations since the expiration of their initial exploration period. While there is no evidence of the contractors being granted an extension after 2017, the petroleum register still lists them as the holders of the Shallow Water Cape Three Points.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690314567544-5e3cf1c8-59b8" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690314567544-5e3cf1c8-59b8" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. Concerning payment obligations on the Shallow Water Cape Three Points Block, Sahara Energy paid US$71,934.93 out of the US$146,934.93 in outstanding Surface Rentals in the first quarter of 2022, leaving an unpaid balance of US$75,000.00.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719939810069-590fecf3-3d6c" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719939810069-590fecf3-3d6c" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Agreement terminated since April 2021</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

contracts.name: East Cape Three Point

updates.2019:
The company acquired 3D seismic data and got extension to process the data and execute its drilling of the required well. There has been no drilling to date.
The company acquired 3D seismic data and got extension to process the data and execute its drilling of the required well. There has been no drilling to date.
updates.2020:
The contractor was due to drill an exploratory well in 2020, but has requested for postponement of the drilling programme due to constraints imposed by the COVID-19 outbreak.
The contractor was due to drill an exploratory well in 2020, but has requested for postponement of the drilling programme due to constraints imposed by the COVID-19 outbreak.
updates.2021:
The contractors suspended their drilling program in 2020 on account of the effects of the pandemic.
The Minister of Energy has consequently granted an 18-month extension to the contractors to drill the obligatory well as required by their minimum work obligations. Medea is planning towards drilling of its obligatory exploration well in Q1 2022.
The contractors suspended their drilling program in 2020 on account of the effects of the pandemic.
The Minister of Energy has consequently granted an 18-month extension to the contractors to drill the obligatory well as required by their minimum work obligations. Medea is planning towards drilling of its obligatory exploration well in Q1 2022.
updates.2022:
The contractors’ drilling campaign for its obligatory well is scheduled for Q4 of 2022.  This schedule remains speculative, given the history of inactivity on the block. However, the 2022 Semi-Annual Report of PIAC reveals the contractors are reported to be engaged in well planning and drilling-related procurements.
From the 2022 PIAC Annual Report, well planning and drilling-related procurement of goods and services are ongoing, with Medea revising the planned drilling of its obligatory exploration well to Q2 2023.
The contractors’ drilling campaign for its obligatory well is scheduled for Q4 of 2022.  This schedule remains speculative, given the history of inactivity on the block. However, the 2022 Semi-Annual Report of PIAC reveals the contractors are reported to be engaged in well planning and drilling-related procurements.
From the 2022 PIAC Annual Report, well planning and drilling-related procurement of goods and services are ongoing, with Medea revising the planned drilling of its obligatory exploration well to Q2 2023.
updates.2023:
Following the well planning and procurement of drilling-related goods and services, Medea has again rescheduled the drilling of its obligatory exploration well to Q4 2023, having previously revised the schedule from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023. The contractor has also conducted further geological and geophysical studies to advance the prospects identified within the block.
Medea Development has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$234,790.
Following the well planning and procurement of drilling-related goods and services, Medea has again rescheduled the drilling of its obligatory exploration well to Q4 2023, having previously revised the schedule from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023. The contractor has also conducted further geological and geophysical studies to advance the prospects identified within the block.
Medea Development has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$234,790.

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {

        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;

        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {

        background: #FF9800;

        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */

        border-width: 6px 0;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {

	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647342319348-4cb7a3e1-9e88" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647342319348-4cb7a3e1-9e88" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6842">
<p class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">The contractor was due to drill an exploratory well in 2020, but has requested for postponement of the drilling programme due to constraints imposed by the COVID-19 outbreak. </span></p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647342346976-f53d9573-848c" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647342346976-f53d9573-848c" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6842">
<p class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;">The contractors suspended their drilling program in 2020 on account of the effects of the pandemic.</p>
<p class="xga-acc-content" style="text-align: justify;">The Minister of Energy has consequently granted an 18-month extension to the contractors to drill the obligatory well as required by their minimum work obligations. Medea is planning towards drilling of its obligatory exploration well in Q1 2022.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690294816550-19e2bf16-1d2c" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690294816550-19e2bf16-1d2c" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6842">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractors’ drilling campaign for its obligatory well is scheduled for Q4 of 2022.  This schedule remains speculative, given the history of inactivity on the block. However, the 2022 Semi-Annual Report of PIAC reveals the contractors are reported to be engaged in well planning and drilling-related procurements.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">From the 2022 PIAC Annual Report, well planning and drilling-related procurement of goods and services are ongoing, with Medea revising the planned drilling of its obligatory exploration well to Q2 2023.</p>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719933830274-e3d9da6a-36f6" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719933830274-e3d9da6a-36f6" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Following the well planning and procurement of drilling-related goods and services, Medea has again rescheduled the drilling of its obligatory exploration well to Q4 2023, having previously revised the schedule from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023. The contractor has also conducted further geological and geophysical studies to advance the prospects identified within the block.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Medea Development has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$234,790.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">

contracts.name: Deepwater Cape Three Points

updates.2021:
The contractors on this block are required to acquire, process, and interpret 2,200 square kilometers (850 square miles) of 3D seismic data and an optional exploration well in their initial exploration phase.
The contractors were granted a restitution time of nine (9) months by the Minister for Energy to compensate for the time lost due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
In May 2021, ExxonMobil voluntarily relinquished their full interests (80 percent) in the block after successfully fulfilling the relevant minimum work obligations. The 80 percent interest relinquished by ExxonMobil has reverted to the State.
The contractors on this block are required to acquire, process, and interpret 2,200 square kilometers (850 square miles) of 3D seismic data and an optional exploration well in their initial exploration phase.
The contractors were granted a restitution time of nine (9) months by the Minister for Energy to compensate for the time lost due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
In May 2021, ExxonMobil voluntarily relinquished their full interests (80 percent) in the block after successfully fulfilling the relevant minimum work obligations. The 80 percent interest relinquished by ExxonMobil has reverted to the State.
updates.2022:
The state assigned the 80% interest relinquished by ExxonMobil in 2021 to GOIL Offshore (now GOIL Upstream) in May 2022, making it the block operator.
GOIL Upstream is currently seeking farm-in partners to finance its exploration campaign on the block.  The block is part of the 6 selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
Concerning payment obligations, GOIL Upstream has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$147,400 with respect to the Deepwater Cape Three Points block.
The state assigned the 80% interest relinquished by ExxonMobil in 2021 to GOIL Offshore (now GOIL Upstream) in May 2022, making it the block operator.
GOIL Upstream is currently seeking farm-in partners to finance its exploration campaign on the block.  The block is part of the 6 selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
Concerning payment obligations, GOIL Upstream has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$147,400 with respect to the Deepwater Cape Three Points block.
updates.2023:
After months of promoting the block, GOIL Upstream signed a Farm-in Agreement and a Joint Operating Agreement with Planet One Oil and Gas Limited on December 6, 2023. These agreements have since been submitted to GNPC and the Ministry of Energy for their consent and approvals respectively.
GOIL Upstream has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$73,700.

GOIL Upstream has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$73,700.

		<style type="text/css">


#ma-simplify-black_white {
    color: black !important; 
    background-color: #ffffff;
}

#ma-simplify-black_sepia {
    color: black !important; 
    background-color: #D9C8AE;
}

#ma-simplify-yellow_black {
    color: yellow !important; 
    background-color: black;
}

#ma-simplify-blue_lightblue {
    color: #009 !important; 
    background-color: #6cf;
}

#talkify-audio {
    visibility: visible;
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0px;
    left: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    z-index: 99999999999999999999;
}


.monkeyAccess {
    position: fixed;
    right: 40px;
    top: 40px;
    z-index: 999999999;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 0 50% 50% 50%;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: dodgerblue;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    position: relative;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon:hover {
    background: #FFA500;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon i {
    font-size: 55px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 32px;
    top: -1px;
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
}

.monkeyAccess span {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 50px;
    color: white;
    margin-top: 4px!important;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    /* right: 110px; */
    /* top: 120px; */
    width: 340px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: "Arial", sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999999;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
    background: dodgerblue;
    color: white;
    font-weight: bold;
    line-height: 4px;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    list-style: none!important;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: background 0.2s;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {
    padding: 10px 0 0 0;
    display: inline-block;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    font-size: 60px;
    line-height: 60px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {
    font-size: 1em;
    position: relative;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li:hover {
    background: #eeeeee;
}

.maGrid:before,
.maGrid:after {
    content: " ";
    display: table;
    clear: both;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter {
    padding: 12px;
    border-radius: 0px 0px 10px 10px;
    background: white;
    font-size: 12px;
    border-top: 2px solid #dddddd;
    font-weight: bold;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter .logo svg {
    width: 36px;
    float: right;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter a {
    color: dodgerblue;
}



.rwScreenMaskOverlay {
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    background-color: #000;
    width: 100%;
    z-index: 10000;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.sm-screen-mask {
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: fixed;
    background: #000;
    width: 100%;
    left: 0;
    display: block;
    z-index: 99999;
}

.sm-screen-mask-upper {
    top: 0;
}

.sm-screen-mask-lower {
    bottom: 0;
}

    .talkify .playing {
        -ms-border-radius: 5px;
        border-radius: 5px;
        background: #ccc !important;
        color: black !important;
    }

    .talkify-highlight {
        -webkit-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -moz-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -ms-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        -o-transition: background-color 0.25s;
        transition: background-color 0.25s;
    }

    .talkify-highlight:hover {
        background-color: #59d600 !important;
        color: #fff !important;
    }

    .talkify-word-highlight {
        color: #fff!important;
        background-color: #E50000 !important;
    }
    .talkify-inline {
        display: inline-block;
        color: #fff;
    }

    .talkify-hidden{
        display: none !important;
    }

    .talkify-disabled {
        color: #ffffff !important;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) !important;
    }

    .talkify-clickable {
        cursor: pointer;
    } 


    }
    
    .talkify-audio-control > *, .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        vertical-align: middle;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress {
        width: 50%;
        background-color: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
        background-color: #5e5e5e
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-value {
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-moz-progress-bar {
        /* style rules */
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control i, .talkify-audio-control input, .talkify-audio-control span {
        margin: 0 5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control .talkify-audio-control-voice-wrapper {
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
            background: white;
        }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        -ms-border-radius: 3px;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #777;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #888;
    }


    .hidePlayer {
        display:none!important;
    }

<article id="post-7534" class="post-7534 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1647436978675" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<blockquote><p>
8. Deepwater Cape Three Points
</p></blockquote>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p>GOIL Upstream (Operator), GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p>Effective Date: November 28, 2018</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (2.5 years): November 28, 2018 – May 27, 2021</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Initial Exploration Programme</strong>​</p>
<ul>
<li>Acquire, process and interpret 2,222 km square of 3D seismic</li>
<li>Drill one (1) Exploration Well</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">US$ 35,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647359584370-995f6d58-cbcf6102-2371" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690291842757-c5fbf700-509f" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719930505039-9ac84b23-b1d0" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647359584370-995f6d58-cbcf6102-2371" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647359584370-995f6d58-cbcf6102-2371" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>The contractors on this block are required to acquire, process, and interpret 2,200 square kilometers (850 square miles) of 3D seismic data and an optional exploration well in their initial exploration phase.</p>
<p>The contractors were granted a restitution time of nine (9) months by the Minister for Energy to compensate for the time lost due to the COVID-19 pandemic.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">In May 2021, ExxonMobil voluntarily relinquished their full interests (80 percent) in the block after successfully fulfilling the relevant minimum work obligations. The 80 percent interest relinquished by ExxonMobil has reverted to the State.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690291842757-c5fbf700-509f" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690291842757-c5fbf700-509f" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The state assigned the 80% interest relinquished by ExxonMobil in 2021 to GOIL Offshore (now GOIL Upstream) in May 2022, making it the block operator.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">GOIL Upstream is currently seeking farm-in partners to finance its exploration campaign on the block.  The block is part of the 6 selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Concerning payment obligations, GOIL Upstream has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$147,400 with respect to the Deepwater Cape Three Points block.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719930505039-9ac84b23-b1d0" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719930505039-9ac84b23-b1d0" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">After months of promoting the block, GOIL Upstream signed a Farm-in Agreement and a Joint Operating Agreement with Planet One Oil and Gas Limited on December 6, 2023. These agreements have since been submitted to GNPC and the Ministry of Energy for their consent and approvals respectively.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">GOIL Upstream has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$73,700.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			

		</div>
	</div>

contracts.name: South West Saltpond Block
minimumExplorationProgram: Acquire and process 1500sqkm of new 3D seismic data

updates.2019:
The contractor did not fulfill the full extent of the minimum work obligation. No drilling has been undertaken.
The contractor did not fulfill the full extent of the minimum work obligation. No drilling has been undertaken.
updates.2020:
The Contractor undertook minimal G&G studies in 2019. The Work Programme and budget for 2020 have not been submitted.
The Contractor undertook minimal G&G studies in 2019. The Work Programme and budget for 2020 have not been submitted.
updates.2021:
The 2019 ACEP Contract Monitor reports that the contractors were still interpreting seismic data, but the full extent of their work obligation has not been met. No drilling has been undertaken.
There were reports of an internal conflict among the partners, confirmed by the Petroleum Commission. This conflict has been resolved and the partners have brought in a Norwegian partner to provide technical and financial assistance. The contractors have requested another extension to complete their work and expenditure obligations.
The 2019 ACEP Contract Monitor reports that the contractors were still interpreting seismic data, but the full extent of their work obligation has not been met. No drilling has been undertaken.
There were reports of an internal conflict among the partners, confirmed by the Petroleum Commission. This conflict has been resolved and the partners have brought in a Norwegian partner to provide technical and financial assistance. The contractors have requested another extension to complete their work and expenditure obligations.
updates.2022:
The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.
For payment obligations on the South West Saltpond Block, Britannia U has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$760,208.83 as of June 2022.

updates.2023:
Agreement terminated since April 2021

		<style type="text/css">


#ma-simplify-black_white {
    color: black !important; 
    background-color: #ffffff;
}

#ma-simplify-black_sepia {
    color: black !important; 
    background-color: #D9C8AE;
}

#ma-simplify-yellow_black {
    color: yellow !important; 
    background-color: black;
}

#ma-simplify-blue_lightblue {
    color: #009 !important; 
    background-color: #6cf;
}

#talkify-audio {
    visibility: visible;
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0px;
    left: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    z-index: 99999999999999999999;
}


.monkeyAccess {
    position: fixed;
    right: 40px;
    top: 40px;
    z-index: 999999999;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 0 50% 50% 50%;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: dodgerblue;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    position: relative;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon:hover {
    background: #FFA500;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon i {
    font-size: 55px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 32px;
    top: -1px;
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
}

.monkeyAccess span {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 50px;
    color: white;
    margin-top: 4px!important;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    /* right: 110px; */
    /* top: 120px; */
    width: 340px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: "Arial", sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999999;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
    background: dodgerblue;
    color: white;
    font-weight: bold;
    line-height: 4px;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    list-style: none!important;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: background 0.2s;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {
    padding: 10px 0 0 0;
    display: inline-block;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    font-size: 60px;
    line-height: 60px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {
    font-size: 1em;
    position: relative;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}

<article id="post-6855" class="post-6855 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690399141018" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>9. South West Saltpond Block</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6856">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Britannia U (Operator), Hills OMC, GNPC</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p>Effective Date: July 17, 2014 (after 27 months extension)</p>
<p>Initial Exploration Period (3 years): October 17, 2016 – October 16, 2019.</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Reprocess 800km of existing 2D seismic data</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Acquire and process 1500sqkm of new 3D seismic data</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) exploration well</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p>$40,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647350200004-db124f53-696f" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647350200034-fa89946a-8858" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647350232038-6d6c1028-aa72" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690315456740-3f38f4a6-2926" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719939133960-6ff9fff7-a5d6" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647350200004-db124f53-696f" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647350200004-db124f53-696f" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6856">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor did not fulfill the full extent of the minimum work obligation. No drilling has been undertaken.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647350200034-fa89946a-8858" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647350200034-fa89946a-8858" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6856">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">The Contractor undertook minimal G&G studies in 2019. The Work Programme and budget for 2020 have not been submitted. </span></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647350232038-6d6c1028-aa72" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647350232038-6d6c1028-aa72" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6856">
<div class="xga-acc-content"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p>The 2019 ACEP Contract Monitor reports that the contractors were still interpreting seismic data, but the full extent of their work obligation has not been met. No drilling has been undertaken.</p>
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">There were reports of an internal conflict among the partners, confirmed by the Petroleum Commission. This conflict has been resolved and the partners have brought in a Norwegian partner to provide technical and financial assistance. The contractors have requested another extension to complete their work and expenditure obligations.</p>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690315456740-3f38f4a6-2926" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690315456740-3f38f4a6-2926" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6856">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. The block is part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">For payment obligations on the South West Saltpond Block, Britannia U has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$760,208.83 as of June 2022.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719939133960-6ff9fff7-a5d6" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719939133960-6ff9fff7-a5d6" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Agreement terminated since April 2021</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

            <style type="text/css" scoped>
            .vc_custom_1451998133493{margin-bottom: 30px !important;}        </style>
        <div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1451998133493"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_wp_custommenu wpb_content_element mb-30"></div>
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
					<div class="mdp-speaker-wrapper">
			<div class="mdp-speaker-box shortcode  speaker-rounded"
			     style="background: rgba(2, 83, 238, 1)">
				<div>
					<!--[if lt IE 9]><script>document.createElement('audio');</script><![endif]-->
<audio class="wp-audio-shortcode" id="audio-6855-1" preload="none" style="width: 100%;" controls="controls"><source type="audio/mpeg" src="http://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/uploads/speaker/post-6855.mp3?cb=1584053507.mp3&_=1" /><a href="http://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/uploads/speaker/post-6855.mp3?cb=1584053507.mp3">http://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/uploads/speaker/post-6855.mp3?cb=1584053507.mp3</a></audio>				</div>

contracts.name: Cape Three Points Block 4
minimumExplorationProgram: Acquire, process and interpret 1000sqkm of 3D seismic
Drill one (1) Exploration Well in the Contract Area

updates.2019:
The contractor acquired the seismic data and completed first drilling towards the end of the initial phase. The drilling encountered gas and condensate discovery which may be subject to appraisal in the exploration period.
The contractor acquired the seismic data and completed first drilling towards the end of the initial phase. The drilling encountered gas and condensate discovery which may be subject to appraisal in the exploration period.
updates.2020:
The Submission of Akoma-1X Appraisal Programme may be delayed. Drilling of the second exploration well postponed from Q2 2020 to first half of 2021.
The Submission of Akoma-1X Appraisal Programme may be delayed. Drilling of the second exploration well postponed from Q2 2020 to first half of 2021.
updates.2021:
This block is at the pre-development phase after successful gas and condensate discovery in its Akoma-1X exploration prospect in 2019 and significant oil discovery in its Eban-1X exploration prospect in 2021.
Preliminary estimates from Eni indicates that the Akoma-Eban complex has the prospect of 500 and 700 million barrels of oil equivalent (mmboe) and could progress quickly to production due to its proximity to existing infrastructures on OCTP Sankofa field operated by Eni.
This block is at the pre-development phase after successful gas and condensate discovery in its Akoma-1X exploration prospect in 2019 and significant oil discovery in its Eban-1X exploration prospect in 2021.
Preliminary estimates from Eni indicates that the Akoma-Eban complex has the prospect of 500 and 700 million barrels of oil equivalent (mmboe) and could progress quickly to production due to its proximity to existing infrastructures on OCTP Sankofa field operated by Eni.
updates.2022:
Eni submitted an appraisal programme for the Akoma and Eban discoveries awaiting approval from the Petroleum Commission.
As part of the work requirements for the Second Extension Exploration Period, preparations are now being made for drilling a new exploration well (Aprokuma-1X).
Eni continued its exploratory activity on Block 4 as part of its minimum work obligation in 2022. The Aprokuma-1X well, which is the third exploration well drilled by Eni in fulfilment of its work obligations under the Petroleum Agreement, was spudded on the 11th of August 2022 in a water depth of 605.5m and resulted in a discovery in the Albian and Cenomanian primary and secondary target respectively. Operations on Aprokuma-1X ended on 22nd September 2022. According to the Petroleum Commission, though Aprokuma is a discovery, in the technical opinion of the operator, it is not sufficient to merit a standalone appraisal.
Eni submitted an appraisal programme for the Akoma and Eban discoveries awaiting approval from the Petroleum Commission.
As part of the work requirements for the Second Extension Exploration Period, preparations are now being made for drilling a new exploration well (Aprokuma-1X).
Eni continued its exploratory activity on Block 4 as part of its minimum work obligation in 2022. The Aprokuma-1X well, which is the third exploration well drilled by Eni in fulfilment of its work obligations under the Petroleum Agreement, was spudded on the 11th of August 2022 in a water depth of 605.5m and resulted in a discovery in the Albian and Cenomanian primary and secondary target respectively. Operations on Aprokuma-1X ended on 22nd September 2022. According to the Petroleum Commission, though Aprokuma is a discovery, in the technical opinion of the operator, it is not sufficient to merit a standalone appraisal.
updates.2023:
There were no drilling and completion operations carried out in this Block for the period, even though an appraisal well is expected to be drilled as a condition for approving the appraisal programme.
There were no drilling and completion operations carried out in this Block for the period, even though an appraisal well is expected to be drilled as a condition for approving the appraisal programme.

        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {

        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;

        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;

        border-width: 6px 0;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
