	<div class="content-area">

		
<article id="post-6868" class="post-6868 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690399248479" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>10. Cape Three Points Block 4 (1,127sqkm)</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Eni Ghana (Operator), Vitol, WoodFields E&P, GNPC EXPLORCO, GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p>Effective Date: April 14, 2016</p>
<p>Initial Exploration Period (3 years): April 14, 2016 – April 13, 2019</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Acquire, process and interpret 1000sqkm of 3D seismic</p>
</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well in the Contract Area</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure </strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">$45,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647355392600-ed63d97a-a1dd" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647355392623-400cf428-6120" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647355425945-8f2980f9-8b84" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690283567678-e891adc3-d702" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719941204138-6c042d12-972f" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647355392600-ed63d97a-a1dd" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647355392600-ed63d97a-a1dd" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor acquired the seismic data and completed first drilling towards the end of the initial phase. The drilling encountered gas and condensate discovery which may be subject to appraisal in the exploration period.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647355392623-400cf428-6120" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647355392623-400cf428-6120" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The Submission of Akoma-1X Appraisal Programme may be delayed. Drilling of the second exploration well postponed from Q2 2020 to first half of 2021.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647355425945-8f2980f9-8b84" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647355425945-8f2980f9-8b84" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">This block is at the pre-development phase after successful gas and condensate discovery in its Akoma-1X exploration prospect in 2019 and significant oil discovery in its Eban-1X exploration prospect in 2021.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Preliminary estimates from Eni indicates that the Akoma-Eban complex has the prospect of 500 and 700 million barrels of oil equivalent (mmboe) and could progress quickly to production due to its proximity to existing infrastructures on OCTP Sankofa field operated by Eni.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690283567678-e891adc3-d702" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690283567678-e891adc3-d702" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Eni submitted an appraisal programme for the Akoma and Eban discoveries awaiting approval from the Petroleum Commission.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">As part of the work requirements for the Second Extension Exploration Period, preparations are now being made for drilling a new exploration well (Aprokuma-1X).</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Eni continued its exploratory activity on Block 4 as part of its minimum work obligation in 2022. The Aprokuma-1X well, which is the third exploration well drilled by Eni in fulfilment of its work obligations under the Petroleum Agreement, was spudded on the 11<sup>th</sup> of August 2022 in a water depth of 605.5m and resulted in a discovery in the Albian and Cenomanian primary and secondary target respectively. Operations on Aprokuma-1X ended on 22<sup>nd</sup> September 2022. According to the Petroleum Commission, though Aprokuma is a discovery, in the technical opinion of the operator, it is not sufficient to merit a standalone appraisal.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719941204138-6c042d12-972f" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719941204138-6c042d12-972f" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">There were no drilling and completion operations carried out in this Block for the period, even though an appraisal well is expected to be drilled as a condition for approving the appraisal programme.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

contracts.name: Onshore/Offshore Keta Delta Block
minimumExplorationProgram: Acquire, process and interpret 1100sqkm of 2D seismic

updates.2019:
The contractor has defaulted on the minimum work obligations. No progress information on the interpretation of legacy data but no drilling has been made.
The contractor has defaulted on the minimum work obligations. No progress information on the interpretation of legacy data but no drilling has been made.
updates.2020:
The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019 citing a dispute with vegetable farmers and some inhabitants in the vicinity of the block as a cause of the inactivity.
The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019 citing a dispute with vegetable farmers and some inhabitants in the vicinity of the block as a cause of the inactivity.
updates.2021:
In the 2019 ACEP Contract Monitor, the contractors were reported to have failed to fulfil their minimum work obligations but continue to hold on to the block.
The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance. It also reports that Swiss Africa has written to the Ministry of Energy to appeal the decision.
In the 2019 ACEP Contract Monitor, the contractors were reported to have failed to fulfil their minimum work obligations but continue to hold on to the block.
The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance. It also reports that Swiss Africa has written to the Ministry of Energy to appeal the decision.
updates.2022:
The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. The 2021 PIAC Annual Report reveals that Swiss Africa had written to the Ministry of Energy to appeal the termination.
For payment obligations on the Onshore/Offshore Keta Delta Block, Swiss Africa has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$862,500 as of June 2022.
The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. The 2021 PIAC Annual Report reveals that Swiss Africa had written to the Ministry of Energy to appeal the termination.
For payment obligations on the Onshore/Offshore Keta Delta Block, Swiss Africa has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$862,500 as of June 2022.
updates.2023:
Agreement terminated since April 2021
Agreement terminated since April 2021

#ma-simplify-black_white {

}

#ma-simplify-black_sepia {

}

#ma-simplify-yellow_black {
    color: yellow !important; 
    background-color: black;
}

#ma-simplify-blue_lightblue {
    color: #009 !important; 
    background-color: #6cf;
}

#talkify-audio {
    visibility: visible;
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0px;
    left: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    z-index: 99999999999999999999;
}


.monkeyAccess {
    position: fixed;
    right: 40px;
    top: 40px;
    z-index: 999999999;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 0 50% 50% 50%;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: dodgerblue;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    position: relative;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon:hover {
    background: #FFA500;
}

.monkeyAccess .icon i {
    font-size: 55px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 32px;
    top: -1px;
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
}

.monkeyAccess span {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 50px;
    color: white;
    margin-top: 4px!important;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -moz-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -ms-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    -o-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
    /* right: 110px; */
    /* top: 120px; */
    width: 340px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: "Arial", sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.23);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999999;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
    background: dodgerblue;
    color: white;
    font-weight: bold;
    line-height: 4px;
}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    list-style: none!important;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;

        /*removes default webkit styles*/

        background: #FF9800;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {

        outline: 1px solid white;

	<div class="content-area">

		
<article id="post-6878" class="post-6878 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690399271269" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>11. Onshore/Offshore Keta Delta Block (3000sqkm)</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties </strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Swiss Africa (Operator), Pet Volta Investments, GNPC.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: March 11, 2016</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (3 years): March 11, 2016 – March 10, 2019</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Acquire, process and interpret 1100sqkm of 2D seismic</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">$40,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647357626033-da133414-e961" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647357626059-5e65e0ef-c7c7" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647357663792-c920b3fd-e486" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690313412176-582eef2d-c6a4" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719939458799-f0514572-c0a2" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647357626033-da133414-e961" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647357626033-da133414-e961" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6879">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor has defaulted on the minimum work obligations. No progress information on the interpretation of legacy data but no drilling has been made.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647357626059-5e65e0ef-c7c7" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647357626059-5e65e0ef-c7c7" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6879">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019 citing a dispute with vegetable farmers and some inhabitants in the vicinity of the block as a cause of the inactivity.</span></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647357663792-c920b3fd-e486" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647357663792-c920b3fd-e486" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6879">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">In the 2019 ACEP Contract Monitor, the contractors were reported to have failed to fulfil their minimum work obligations but continue to hold on to the block.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance. It also reports that Swiss Africa has written to the Ministry of Energy to appeal the decision.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690313412176-582eef2d-c6a4" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690313412176-582eef2d-c6a4" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance. The 2021 PIAC Annual Report reveals that Swiss Africa had written to the Ministry of Energy to appeal the termination.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">For payment obligations on the Onshore/Offshore Keta Delta Block, Swiss Africa has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$862,500 as of June 2022.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719939458799-f0514572-c0a2" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719939458799-f0514572-c0a2" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Agreement terminated since April 2021</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div>
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

            <style type="text/css" scoped>
            .vc_custom_1451998133493{margin-bottom: 30px !important;}        </style>
        <div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1451998133493"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_wp_custommenu wpb_content_element mb-30"></div>
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
					<div class="mdp-speaker-wrapper">
			<div class="mdp-speaker-box shortcode  speaker-rounded"
			     style="background: rgba(2, 83, 238, 1)">

				$(".maCursor").clickToggle(function () {
					$('body').css('cursor', 'url(https://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/plugins/monkeyaccessibility/inc/cursor.png), auto');
					$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', 'url(https://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/plugins/monkeyaccessibility/inc/pointer.png), auto');
					$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', 'red');
					localStorage.setItem('cursor', 'on');
				}, function () {
					$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', '#333333');
					$('body').css('cursor', '');
					$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', '');
					localStorage.setItem('cursor', 'off');
				});
				
				// doc ready
				$(document).ready(function(){
					//Talkify ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
					talkify.config.remoteService.host = 'https://talkify.net';
					talkify.config.remoteService.apiKey = '09c7131b-2e6e-49fc-9736-95ccb39eec0d';
					
					talkify.config.ui.audioControls = {
						enabled: false, //<-- Disable to get the browser built in audio controls
						container: document.body
					};
                    
				 	var player = new talkify.TtsPlayer()
				    					.enableTextHighlighting();
					;
					
					var playlist = new talkify.playlist()
						.begin()
						.usingPlayer(player)
						.withElements()
												.withTextInteraction()
												.build()
				    				
					// Check if Cursor Activated ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
					var cursor = localStorage.getItem('cursor');
					if (cursor == 'on') {
						$('body').css('cursor', 'url(cursor.png), auto');
						$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', 'url(https://ghanacontractmonitor.com/wp-content/plugins/monkeyaccessibility/inc/pointer.png), auto');
						$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', 'red');
					} else {
						$('.maCursor .maIcon').css('color', '#333333');
						$('body').css('cursor', '');
						$('a, button, .monkeyAccess .icon, .talkify-highlight').css('cursor', '');
					}

					//Speak Function ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
					$(".maSpeak").clickToggle(function () {
						$('#talkify-audio').css('visibility','visible');	
						localStorage.setItem('speak', 'on');
						$('.maSpeak .maIcon').css('color', 'red');
						//play speaker
						
						playlist.play();
					}, function () {
						$('#talkify-audio').css('visibility','hidden');
						localStorage.setItem('speak', 'off');
						$('.maSpeak .maIcon').css('color', '#333333');
						playlist.pause();
					});

				}); // end Document.ready

			})(jQuery);
		</script>

contracts.name: Offshore Cape Three Points South Block
minimumExplorationProgram: License and reprocess existing 600sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the Contract Area
Acquire and reprocess new seismic data (if deemed necessary)

updates.2019:
The contractor has defaulted on the minimum work obligations. No drilling has been made.
The contractor has defaulted on the minimum work obligations. No drilling has been made.
updates.2020:
The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019. The Work Programme and Budget for 2020 has not been submitted.
The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019. The Work Programme and Budget for 2020 has not been submitted.
updates.2021:
The contractors on this block are required to license and reprocess existing 600sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the contract area and drill one (1) exploration well. The contractors have constituently failed to deliver on its minimum work obligations yet continue to hold on to the block.
The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance.
The contractors on this block are required to license and reprocess existing 600sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the contract area and drill one (1) exploration well. The contractors have constituently failed to deliver on its minimum work obligations yet continue to hold on to the block.
The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance.
updates.2022:
The agreement for this block was terminated on 27th April 2021 for non-performance.
Concerning payment obligations on the Offshore Cape Three Points South Block, UB Resources has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$105,415.58 as of June 2022.
The block was part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.

        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;

        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {

        width: 12px;

        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {

<article id="post-6889" class="post-6889 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690399379850" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>12. Offshore Cape Three Points South Block</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p>UB Resources (Operator), Royalgate Gh Ltd., Houston Drilling Management Gh Ltd., GNPC</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: September 17, 2014</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration (3 years): September 17, 2014 – September 16, 2017</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">License and reprocess existing 600sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the Contract Area</p>
</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Acquire and reprocess new seismic data (if deemed necessary)</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p>$80,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647358331788-18a34cb3-0e60" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647358331809-f9734372-6147" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647358362209-52ce0f73-8455" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690303853071-4a4a8a23-5de3" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719940560899-204d46b1-e7cf" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647358331788-18a34cb3-0e60" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647358331788-18a34cb3-0e60" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6890">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor has defaulted on the minimum work obligations. No drilling has been made.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647358331809-f9734372-6147" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647358331809-f9734372-6147" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6890">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">The Contractor did not undertake any activity in 2019. The Work Programme and Budget for 2020 has not been submitted.</span></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;"></div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647358362209-52ce0f73-8455" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647358362209-52ce0f73-8455" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6890">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractors on this block are required to license and reprocess existing 600sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the contract area and drill one (1) exploration well. The contractors have constituently failed to deliver on its minimum work obligations yet continue to hold on to the block.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The 2021 PIAC Semi-Annual Report reveals that the Petroleum Commission has commenced processes for the termination of this agreement on the grounds of non-performance.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690303853071-4a4a8a23-5de3" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690303853071-4a4a8a23-5de3" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6890">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;">The agreement for this block was terminated on 27<sup>th</sup> April 2021 for non-performance.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Concerning payment obligations on the Offshore Cape Three Points South Block, UB Resources has an outstanding surface rental payment of US$105,415.58 as of June 2022.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The block was part of the six selected blocks the Ministry of Energy marketed to investors as part of the 2022 Ghana Oil and Gas Roadshows in Houston, USA and London, Aberdeen in the UK.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719940560899-204d46b1-e7cf" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719940560899-204d46b1-e7cf" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Agreement terminated since April 2021</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">

contracts.name: Deepwater Cape Three Points West Offshore
minimumExplorationProgram: License and reprocess existing 850sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the Contract Area

updates.2019:
The contractor commenced reprocessing of existing seismic data. No drilling has still been made.
The contractor commenced reprocessing of existing seismic data. No drilling has still been made.
updates.2020:
Conflicts between parties was resolved, with readmission of A-Z into the block. Contractor commenced planning to drill its first exploration well, the Dawadawa-1X in Q3 2020.
Contractor’s work programme for 2021 requires drilling of at least one exploratory well. Tender processes for a rig and other long lead items commenced. Contractor has informed the Commission of its intention to postpone drilling activities due to COVID-19
Conflicts between parties was resolved, with readmission of A-Z into the block. Contractor commenced planning to drill its first exploration well, the Dawadawa-1X in Q3 2020. 
Contractor’s work programme for 2021 requires drilling of at least one exploratory well. Tender processes for a rig and other long lead items commenced. Contractor has informed the Commission of its intention to postpone drilling activities due to COVID-19
updates.2021:
In 2020, the contractor submitted plans and gave the indication of commencing the process of rig tendering, tangibles contracts, and support services contracts for its exploration drilling. These plans were however suspended on account of the pandemic. The Minister for Energy granted Eco Atlantic a restitution time of eight (8) months to compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.
In 2021, the contractors resumed plans towards drilling its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X in Q2 2022, with well planning and drilling related procurements.
In 2020, the contractor submitted plans and gave the indication of commencing the process of rig tendering, tangibles contracts, and support services contracts for its exploration drilling. These plans were however suspended on account of the pandemic. The Minister for Energy granted Eco Atlantic a restitution time of eight (8) months to compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.
In 2021, the contractors resumed plans towards drilling its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X in Q2 2022, with well planning and drilling related procurements.
updates.2022:
The operator’s drilling campaign for its obligatory well, Dawadawa-1X, is scheduled for Q4 2022 after being postponed from an earlier schedule of Q2 2022.
However, the 2022 Annual Report of PIAC reveals that Eco Atlantic continued well planning and procuring drilling-related goods and services and now expects to drill its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X, in Q2 2023, even though it had earlier been scheduled for Q4 2022.
The operator’s drilling campaign for its obligatory well, Dawadawa-1X, is scheduled for Q4 2022 after being postponed from an earlier schedule of Q2 2022.
However, the 2022 Annual Report of PIAC reveals that Eco Atlantic continued well planning and procuring drilling-related goods and services and now expects to drill its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X, in Q2 2023, even though it had earlier been scheduled for Q4 2022.
updates.2023:
Eco Atlantic has reportedly continued with well planning and the procurement of drilling-related goods and services in preparation for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X. This follows previous rescheduling of the drilling operations, initially set for Q4 2022, then moved to Q2 2023, and subsequently to Q4 2023.
The contractor is reportedly active in the rig market, seeking to procure a drilling unit to meet its well commitment.
Eco Atlantic has reportedly continued with well planning and the procurement of drilling-related goods and services in preparation for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X. This follows previous rescheduling of the drilling operations, initially set for Q4 2022, then moved to Q2 2023, and subsequently to Q4 2023.
The contractor is reportedly active in the rig market, seeking to procure a drilling unit to meet its well commitment.

#monkeyAccessPopout {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;

    border-radius: 10px;

}

#monkeyAccessPopout a {
    text-decoration: none;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maHeader {

}


#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody {
    padding: 20px;
    background: white;
    display: block;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maBody .maTitle{
    margin-top: 14px;
}



#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li {
    width: 50%;
    float: left;
    height: 120px;
    text-align: center;

}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li>a {
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    color: #333333;
    -webkit-transition: background 0.2s;
    -moz-transition: background 0.2s;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid .maIcon {
    padding: 10px 0 0 0;
    display: inline-block;
    -webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 0.2s;
    transition: -moz-transform 0.2s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    font-size: 60px;
    line-height: 60px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid h3 {
    font-size: 1em;
    position: relative;

}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maGrid li:hover {

}

.maGrid:before,
.maGrid:after {

}

#monkeyAccessPopout .maFooter {

}

}

}

<article id="post-6903" class="post-6903 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690399434321" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>13. Deepwater Cape Three Points West Offshore</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties</strong></p>
<p>Eco Atlantic (Operator), A-Z Petroleum, Petrogulf Limited, GNPC EXPLORCO, GNPC</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: March 22, 2015</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (2.5 years): March 22, 2015 – September 21, 2017</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">License and reprocess existing 850sqkm of 3D seismic data relating to the Contract Area</p>
</li>
<li style="text-align: justify;">Reprocess 850sqkm 3D seismic data</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">$65,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647359554129-05a1e880-fb7b" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647359554148-95872136-696a" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647359584370-995f6d58-cbcf" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690390369130-85e1c170-ca13" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719933246484-d4abc6f9-1b06" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647359554129-05a1e880-fb7b" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647359554129-05a1e880-fb7b" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor commenced reprocessing of existing seismic data. No drilling has still been made.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647359554148-95872136-696a" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647359554148-95872136-696a" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">Conflicts between parties was resolved, with readmission of A-Z into the block. Contractor commenced planning to drill its first exploration well, the Dawadawa-1X in Q3 2020. </span></p>
<p>Contractor’s work programme for 2021 requires drilling of at least one exploratory well. Tender processes for a rig and <span lang="EN-GB">other long </span>lead items commenced. <span lang="EN-GB">Contractor has informed the Commission of its intention to postpone drilling activities due to COVID-19</span></p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647359584370-995f6d58-cbcf" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647359584370-995f6d58-cbcf" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">In 2020, the contractor submitted plans and gave the indication of commencing the process of rig tendering, tangibles contracts, and support services contracts for its exploration drilling. These plans were however suspended on account of the pandemic. The Minister for Energy granted Eco Atlantic a restitution time of eight (8) months to compensate for the time lost due to the pandemic.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">In 2021, the contractors resumed plans towards drilling its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X in Q2 2022, with well planning and drilling related procurements.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690390369130-85e1c170-ca13" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690390369130-85e1c170-ca13" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The operator’s drilling campaign for its obligatory well, Dawadawa-1X, is scheduled for Q4 2022 after being postponed from an earlier schedule of Q2 2022.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">However, the 2022 Annual Report of PIAC reveals that Eco Atlantic continued well planning and procuring drilling-related goods and services and now expects to drill its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X, in Q2 2023, even though it had earlier been scheduled for Q4 2022.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719933246484-d4abc6f9-1b06" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719933246484-d4abc6f9-1b06" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">Eco Atlantic has reportedly continued with well planning and the procurement of drilling-related goods and services in preparation for drilling its obligatory exploration well, Dawadawa-1X. This follows previous rescheduling of the drilling operations, initially set for Q4 2022, then moved to Q2 2023, and subsequently to Q4 2023.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor is reportedly active in the rig market, seeking to procure a drilling unit to meet its well commitment.</p>

contracts.name: West Cape Three Points Block 2

updates.2019:
The contractor has acquired 3D data for processing. The extension granted in 2016 will expire in 2021. However the 9 months granted by Petroleum commission for the company to submit appraisal programme for inherited discoveries is still in default.
No drilling has been made to date.
The contractor has acquired 3D data for processing. The extension granted in 2016 will expire in 2021. However the 9 months granted by Petroleum commission for the company to submit appraisal programme for inherited discoveries is still in default.
No drilling has been made to date.
updates.2020:
The Contractor drilled the Afina-1X and made a discovery, indicating in 2020 that the discovery merits appraisal.
Contractor notified the government of its intention to appraise the Afina Cenomanian Discovery with the submission of the Appraisal Program in May.
The Contractor has requested for the extension of deadline for submitting the appraisal programme to 2021 due to the pandemic.
The Contractor drilled the Afina-1X and made a discovery, indicating in 2020 that the discovery merits appraisal. 
Contractor notified the government of its intention to appraise the Afina Cenomanian Discovery with the submission of the Appraisal Program in May. 
The Contractor has requested for the extension of deadline for submitting the appraisal programme to 2021 due to the pandemic.
updates.2021:
This block is at the pre-development phase after a successful drilling campaign amidst the constraints of the Covid-19 resulted in discoveries on its Afina-1X well.
Springfield claims this discovery straddles Eni’s Sankofa field, but Eni disagrees with the position. The Minister of Energy subsequently directed the unitization of both fields for joint production in October 2020. This directive has led to a protracted legal tussle between the two companies since 2020.
Springfield has filed a suit to enforce the Minister of Energy’s directive. In June 2021, Springfield filed and won an application at a Commercial High Court for the preservation of 30 percent of oil proceeds from the Sankofa Field in an escrow account, pending the final determination of the case commenced by Springfield in respect of the unitization directive. Eni filed for a judicial review of this decision and lost.
In August 2021, Eni filed a lawsuit at the International Tribunal in London to challenge the Minister’s directive to unitize the two fields. As of the time of this report, that case is still pending at the Tribunal, with no conclusive agreement on unitizing the two fields.
This block is at the pre-development phase after a successful drilling campaign amidst the constraints of the Covid-19 resulted in discoveries on its Afina-1X well.
Springfield claims this discovery straddles Eni’s Sankofa field, but Eni disagrees with the position. The Minister of Energy subsequently directed the unitization of both fields for joint production in October 2020. This directive has led to a protracted legal tussle between the two companies since 2020.
Springfield has filed a suit to enforce the Minister of Energy’s directive. In June 2021, Springfield filed and won an application at a Commercial High Court for the preservation of 30 percent of oil proceeds from the Sankofa Field in an escrow account, pending the final determination of the case commenced by Springfield in respect of the unitization directive. Eni filed for a judicial review of this decision and lost.
In August 2021, Eni filed a lawsuit at the International Tribunal in London to challenge the Minister’s directive to unitize the two fields. As of the time of this report, that case is still pending at the Tribunal, with no conclusive agreement on unitizing the two fields.
updates.2022:
The dispute between Springfield and Eni Ghana over the Minister of Energy’s unitization directive remains unresolved and is pending arbitration at the International Tribunal in London. This has stalled any development on Springfield’s Afina-1X and the potential revenues that could accrue to Ghana.
On the Minister for Energy’s directive to unitize the Afina (West Cape Three Points [WCTP] Block 2) discovery and the Sankofa Field, there was no conclusive agreement on this subject as of December 2022. According to Eni, the High Court of Ghana granted Springfield’s application for an interlocutory injunction on 15th July 2022, restraining GNPC and the Ministry of Energy from making further monthly payments due Eni and Vitol under their various agreements. Eni and Vitol continue to exercise their legal rights seeking to overturn the said Preservation Order, Varied Order and injunction Order of 15th July 2022. Eni and Vitol have also filed the necessary appeals against these orders, which are presently pending. Eni reported that GNPC and the Attorney General had filed applications in the High Court seeking to set aside the injunction order of 15th July 2022. In a different vein, Springfield filed a motion for contempt on 11th October 2022. The parties are presently awaiting the hearing of this application.
This update was provided under section 3.4 (Development in the Investment Climate). No update was found under exploration activities in the 2022 PIAC annual report.

updates.2023:
The arbitration hearing on the dispute between Springfield and Eni Ghana over the Minister of Energy’s unitization directive was held at the International Tribunal in London. This was between late July and early August 2023 and the verdict is pending.
Springfield E&P has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$84,087.

    .talkify .playing {

    .talkify-highlight {
        -webkit-transition: background-color 0.25s;

    .talkify-audio-control > *, .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        vertical-align: middle;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress {
        width: 50%;
        background-color: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
        background-color: #5e5e5e
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-webkit-progress-value {
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control progress::-moz-progress-bar {
        /* style rules */
        background-color: #1ed760;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control i, .talkify-audio-control input, .talkify-audio-control span {
        margin: 0 5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control .talkify-audio-control-voice-wrapper {
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }


    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
            background: white;
        }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        -ms-border-radius: 3px;
        border-radius: 3px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #777;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #888;
    }

<article id="post-6914" class="post-6914 page type-page status-publish hentry">

	<div class="entry-content">
					<div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-8"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1690399473626" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>14. West Cape Three Points Block 2 (673sqkm)</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6915">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Contract Parties </strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Springfield E&P (Operator), GNPC EXPLORCO, GNPC</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Effective Date/Initial Exploration Period</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Effective Date: July 26, 2016</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Initial Exploration Period (2.5 years + 2 years extension): July 26, 2016 – January 25, 2021</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p><strong>Minimum Exploration Program (Initial Phase)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Drill one (1) Exploration Well</p>
</li>
<li>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Conduct geological and geophysical studies</p>
</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="xga-accrodion">
<div class="xga-accordion-body show" data-parent="xga-accrodion-6773">
<div class="xga-acc-content">
<p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Minimum Expenditure</strong></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">$30,000,000</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="xga-accrodion">
<p class="xga-accordion-heading" style="text-align: justify;">
</div>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1582672989283" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647360366110-a5c90161-0b38" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647360366133-33cf1ec1-c2f0" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647360438416-77fc89c9-0fe2" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690393190238-0fd61da2-b1b9" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719939062415-ae906b1a-11b2" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647360366110-a5c90161-0b38" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647360366110-a5c90161-0b38" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractor has acquired 3D data for processing. The extension granted in 2016 will expire in 2021. However the 9 months granted by Petroleum commission for the company to submit appraisal programme for inherited discoveries is still in default.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">No drilling has been made to date.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647360366133-33cf1ec1-c2f0" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647360366133-33cf1ec1-c2f0" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">The Contractor drilled the Afina-1X and made a discovery, indicating in 2020 that the discovery merits appraisal. </span></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN-GB">Contractor notified the government of its intention to appraise the Afina Cenomanian Discovery with the submission of the Appraisal Program in May. </span></p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">The Contractor has requested for the extension of deadline for submitting the appraisal programme to 2021 due to the pandemic.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647360438416-77fc89c9-0fe2" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647360438416-77fc89c9-0fe2" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">This block is at the pre-development phase after a successful drilling campaign amidst the constraints of the Covid-19 resulted in discoveries on its Afina-1X well.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Springfield claims this discovery straddles Eni’s Sankofa field, but Eni disagrees with the position. The Minister of Energy subsequently directed the unitization of both fields for joint production in October 2020. This directive has led to a protracted legal tussle between the two companies since 2020.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Springfield has filed a suit to enforce the Minister of Energy’s directive. In June 2021, Springfield filed and won an application at a Commercial High Court for the preservation of 30 percent of oil proceeds from the Sankofa Field in an escrow account, pending the final determination of the case commenced by Springfield in respect of the unitization directive. Eni filed for a judicial review of this decision and lost.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">In August 2021, Eni filed a lawsuit at the International Tribunal in London to challenge the Minister’s directive to unitize the two fields. As of the time of this report, that case is still pending at the Tribunal, with no conclusive agreement on unitizing the two fields.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690393190238-0fd61da2-b1b9" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690393190238-0fd61da2-b1b9" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The dispute between Springfield and Eni Ghana over the Minister of Energy’s unitization directive remains unresolved and is pending arbitration at the International Tribunal in London. This has stalled any development on Springfield’s Afina-1X and the potential revenues that could accrue to Ghana.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">On the Minister for Energy’s directive to unitize the Afina (West Cape Three Points [WCTP] Block 2) discovery and the Sankofa Field, there was no conclusive agreement on this subject as of December 2022. According to Eni, the High Court of Ghana granted Springfield’s application for an interlocutory injunction on 15<sup>th</sup> July 2022, restraining GNPC and the Ministry of Energy from making further monthly payments due Eni and Vitol under their various agreements. Eni and Vitol continue to exercise their legal rights seeking to overturn the said Preservation Order, Varied Order and injunction Order of 15th July 2022. Eni and Vitol have also filed the necessary appeals against these orders, which are presently pending. Eni reported that GNPC and the Attorney General had filed applications in the High Court seeking to set aside the injunction order of 15th July 2022. In a different vein, Springfield filed a motion for contempt on 11th October 2022. The parties are presently awaiting the hearing of this application.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">This update was provided under section 3.4 (Development in the Investment Climate). No update was found under exploration activities in the 2022 PIAC annual report.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719939062415-ae906b1a-11b2" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719939062415-ae906b1a-11b2" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The arbitration hearing on the dispute between Springfield and Eni Ghana over the Minister of Energy’s unitization directive was held at the International Tribunal in London. This was between late July and early August 2023 and the verdict is pending.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">Springfield E&P has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$84,087.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

contracts.name: East Keta Block
minimumExplorationProgram: Reprocess existing 2D and acquire 1500sqkm of 3D seismic

updates.2019:
The extended period has also expired and the contractor has not met the minimum work obligations.  GNPC’s subsidiary is the operator of the block but that is not an excuse to shield majority interest holders from nonperformance.
The extended period has also expired and the contractor has not met the minimum work obligations.  GNPC’s subsidiary is the operator of the block but that is not an excuse to shield majority interest holders from nonperformance.
updates.2020:
The Contractor engaged CGG in 2016 to acquire 3D seismic data. The seismic vessel was intercepted by Togolese navy and frustrated the acquisition work. The matter still remains unresolved between Ghana and Togo.
The Contractor engaged CGG in 2016 to acquire 3D seismic data. The seismic vessel was intercepted by Togolese navy and frustrated the acquisition work. The matter still remains unresolved between Ghana and Togo.
updates.2021:
The contractors on this block are required to reprocess existing 2D seismic data and acquire 1500sqkm 3D seismic data. Even after a 2-year extension to the initial exploration in 2017, the contractors have still failed to deliver on their minimum work obligations. However, the contractors have not been sanctioned for their non-performance. Coincidentally, the operator is a subsidiary of GNPC.
The contractors on this block are required to reprocess existing 2D seismic data and acquire 1500sqkm 3D seismic data. Even after a 2-year extension to the initial exploration in 2017, the contractors have still failed to deliver on their minimum work obligations. However, the contractors have not been sanctioned for their non-performance. Coincidentally, the operator is a subsidiary of GNPC.
updates.2022:
The contractors have failed to deliver on their work obligations without any sanctions. The only activity worthy of note is the change of name of GOSCO to OSWT & EK Operating Company Ghana Limited (OPCO) as a special purpose vehicle set up by the contractors on the East Keta (EK) block and the South West Tano (SWT) block.  It is important to highlight that both blocks share the same contractors.
With respect to payment obligations on the East Keta block, OPCO has an outstanding surface rentals payment of US$537,794.80
The contractors have failed to deliver on their work obligations without any sanctions. The only activity worthy of note is the change of name of GOSCO to OSWT & EK Operating Company Ghana Limited (OPCO) as a special purpose vehicle set up by the contractors on the East Keta (EK) block and the South West Tano (SWT) block.  It is important to highlight that both blocks share the same contractors.
With respect to payment obligations on the East Keta block, OPCO has an outstanding surface rentals payment of US$537,794.80
updates.2023:
OPCO carried out well planning and drilling related procurement of goods and services in 2021 and made preparation towards the drilling of its obligatory exploration well, for Q4 2024 after delays in previous rescheduling; i.e. from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023, and then to Q4 2023. Additionally, OPCO is reported to be in discussions with Tullow for a potential rig-sharing opportunity.
OPCO has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$537,795 for the East Keta Block

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range] {
        /*removes default webkit styles*/
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        /*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
        width: 75px;
        background: transparent;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;

        -webkit-appearance: none;
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -5px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus {
        outline: none;
    }

        .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
            background: white;

        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;
        background: white;
        border: none;

        border-radius: 3px;

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
    }



    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:-moz-focusring {
        outline: 1px solid white;
        -ms-outline-offset: -1px;
        outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-track {
        width: 75px;
        height: 3px;

        background: transparent;
        /*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
        border-color: transparent;
        border-width: 6px 0;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-lower {
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-fill-upper {
        background: #777;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]::-ms-thumb {
        border: none;
        height: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        -ms-border-radius: 50%;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #FF9800;
        margin-top: -1px;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
        background: white;
    }

    .talkify-audio-control input[type=range]:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
