	</div>
<div class="vc_tta-container" data-vc-action="collapse"><div class="vc_general vc_tta vc_tta-tabs vc_tta-color-orange vc_tta-style-modern vc_tta-shape-rounded vc_tta-spacing-1 vc_tta-tabs-position-top vc_tta-controls-align-left"><div class="vc_tta-tabs-container"><ul class="vc_tta-tabs-list"><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647365232847-061dae76-2d0c" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647365232869-f77cc942-e116" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1647365267693-26099dc5-2c41" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab" data-vc-tab><a href="#1690301113177-86447ffe-1664" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></li><li class="vc_tta-tab vc_active" data-vc-tab><a href="#1719930710123-fc38ffe3-ff4b" data-vc-tabs data-vc-container=".vc_tta"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></li></ul></div><div class="vc_tta-panels-container"><div class="vc_tta-panels"><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647365232847-061dae76-2d0c" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647365232847-061dae76-2d0c" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2019 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The extended period has also expired and the contractor has not met the minimum work obligations.  GNPC’s subsidiary is the operator of the block but that is not an excuse to shield majority interest holders from nonperformance.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647365232869-f77cc942-e116" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647365232869-f77cc942-e116" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2020 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The Contractor engaged CGG in 2016 to acquire 3D seismic data. The seismic vessel was intercepted by Togolese navy and frustrated the acquisition work. The matter still remains unresolved between Ghana and Togo.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1647365267693-26099dc5-2c41" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1647365267693-26099dc5-2c41" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2021 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractors on this block are required to reprocess existing 2D seismic data and acquire 1500sqkm 3D seismic data. Even after a 2-year extension to the initial exploration in 2017, the contractors have still failed to deliver on their minimum work obligations. However, the contractors have not been sanctioned for their non-performance. Coincidentally, the operator is a subsidiary of GNPC.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel" id="1690301113177-86447ffe-1664" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1690301113177-86447ffe-1664" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2022 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">The contractors have failed to deliver on their work obligations without any sanctions. The only activity worthy of note is the change of name of GOSCO to OSWT & EK Operating Company Ghana Limited (OPCO) as a special purpose vehicle set up by the contractors on the East Keta (EK) block and the South West Tano (SWT) block.  It is important to highlight that both blocks share the same contractors.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">With respect to payment obligations on the East Keta block, OPCO has an outstanding surface rentals payment of US$537,794.80</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div><div class="vc_tta-panel vc_active" id="1719930710123-fc38ffe3-ff4b" data-vc-content=".vc_tta-panel-body"><div class="vc_tta-panel-heading"><h4 class="vc_tta-panel-title"><a href="#1719930710123-fc38ffe3-ff4b" data-vc-accordion data-vc-container=".vc_tta-container"><span class="vc_tta-title-text">2023 Update</span></a></h4></div><div class="vc_tta-panel-body">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p style="text-align: justify;">OPCO carried out well planning and drilling related procurement of goods and services in 2021 and made preparation towards the drilling of its obligatory exploration well, for Q4 2024 after delays in previous rescheduling; i.e. from Q4 2022 to Q2 2023, and then to Q4 2023. Additionally, OPCO is reported to be in discussions with Tullow for a potential rig-sharing opportunity.</p>
<p style="text-align: justify;">OPCO has an outstanding surface rental balance of US$537,795 for the East Keta Block</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="stm_sidebar">

            <style type="text/css" scoped>
            .vc_custom_1451998133493{margin-bottom: 30px !important;}        </style>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element " >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
					<div class="mdp-speaker-wrapper">
			<div class="mdp-speaker-box shortcode  speaker-rounded"
			     style="background: rgba(2, 83, 238, 1)">

</article>
